rows.kernel: Pre-word neural activity is described as proof that the brain predicts the upcoming word.
rows.full: Pre-word neural activity is described as proof that the brain predicts the upcoming word. Yet anticipatory activity could reflect multiple possibilities: semantic preparation, syntactic expectation, prosodic timing, motor simulation, attentional readiness, or prediction of a category rather than a specific lexical item.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Pre-word neural activity is described as proof that the brain predicts the upcoming word.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article interprets stronger responses to unexpected words as an energy-expensive rewriting of an internal context map.
rows.full: The article interprets stronger responses to unexpected words as an energy-expensive rewriting of an internal context map. The reported evidence concerns neural amplitude, not direct measurements of metabolic cost or complete representational revision. A plausible theoretical interpretation is presented as observed mechanism.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article interprets stronger responses to unexpected words as an energy-expensive rewriting of an internal context map.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The study is invoked in the debate between innate grammar and experience-based language learning, but correlating brain responses with model probabilities does not resolve that dispute.
rows.full: The study is invoked in the debate between innate grammar and experience-based language learning, but correlating brain responses with model probabilities does not resolve that dispute. An innately structured system and a learned statistical system could both make context-sensitive predictions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The study is invoked in the debate between innate grammar and experience-based language learning, but correlating brain responses with model probabilities does not resolve that dispute.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article presents self-employment as a transition pathway while offering no evidence that the businesses formed through the platform survive, generate adequate income, or outperform ordinary wage employment.
rows.full: The article presents self-employment as a transition pathway while offering no evidence that the businesses formed through the platform survive, generate adequate income, or outperform ordinary wage employment. Registration volume is treated as a proxy for entrepreneurial success.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article presents self-employment as a transition pathway while offering no evidence that the businesses formed through the platform survive, generate adequate income, or outperform ordinary wage employment.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Tailor Brands claims to remove “back-office clutter,” yet its expansion into more than twenty services may make the founder increasingly dependent on one intermediary for legal status, compliance, finance, and records.
rows.full: Tailor Brands claims to remove “back-office clutter,” yet its expansion into more than twenty services may make the founder increasingly dependent on one intermediary for legal status, compliance, finance, and records. Administrative simplification can become platform concentration.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Tailor Brands claims to remove “back-office clutter,” yet its expansion into more than twenty services may make the founder increasingly dependent on one intermediary for legal status, compliance, finance, and records.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The company portrays AI as easing the consequences of automation-driven disruption, but its own automation may reduce demand for lawyers, bookkeepers, filing specialists, designers, and administrative workers.
rows.full: The company portrays AI as easing the consequences of automation-driven disruption, but its own automation may reduce demand for lawyers, bookkeepers, filing specialists, designers, and administrative workers. The proposed remedy reproduces the same labor-displacement mechanism at another layer.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The company portrays AI as easing the consequences of automation-driven disruption, but its own automation may reduce demand for lawyers, bookkeepers, filing specialists, designers, and administrative workers.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Connecting directly to government agencies and thousands of counties is presented as operational efficiency, but the article does not discuss error correction, rejected filings, changing local rules…
rows.full: Connecting directly to government agencies and thousands of counties is presented as operational efficiency, but the article does not discuss error correction, rejected filings, changing local rules, unauthorized practice of law, or who bears responsibility when automation fails.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Connecting directly to government agencies and thousands of counties is presented as operational efficiency, but the article does not discuss error correction, rejected filings, changing local rules…

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The stated market size combines legal, filing, compliance, financial, and administrative services…
rows.full: The stated market size combines legal, filing, compliance, financial, and administrative services, but the article gives no basis for determining how much of that market can be safely automated or how Tailor Brands’ revenue compares with the value of obligations it manages.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The stated market size combines legal, filing, compliance, financial, and administrative services…

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The Five Eyes agencies urge organizations to adopt AI for defense while governments restrict access to the models described as most capable.
rows.full: The Five Eyes agencies urge organizations to adopt AI for defense while governments restrict access to the models described as most capable. The policy simultaneously frames frontier AI as indispensable protective infrastructure and as technology too dangerous to distribute.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The Five Eyes agencies urge organizations to adopt AI for defense while governments restrict access to the models described as most capable.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The warning says transformative offensive capability is months away, but the article offers no disclosed benchmark, incident, capability threshold, or comparative evaluation supporting that timeline.
rows.full: The warning says transformative offensive capability is months away, but the article offers no disclosed benchmark, incident, capability threshold, or comparative evaluation supporting that timeline. Classification may explain the absence of evidence, but it also makes independent scrutiny impossible.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The warning says transformative offensive capability is months away, but the article offers no disclosed benchmark, incident, capability threshold, or comparative evaluation supporting that timeline.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The Australian government promotes light-touch regulation and economic opportunity while its signals agency joins an unusually urgent security warning.
rows.full: The Australian government promotes light-touch regulation and economic opportunity while its signals agency joins an unusually urgent security warning. Innovation policy and national-security assessment appear to operate on incompatible assumptions about the same technological trajectory.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The Australian government promotes light-touch regulation and economic opportunity while its signals agency joins an unusually urgent security warning.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Fable is described as a more community-friendly version of Mythos, yet it is suspended under the same foreign-national restriction.
rows.full: Fable is described as a more community-friendly version of Mythos, yet it is suspended under the same foreign-national restriction. This suggests that safety tuning or reduced capability may not meaningfully alter policy once a model belongs to a politically sensitive capability family.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Fable is described as a more community-friendly version of Mythos, yet it is suspended under the same foreign-national restriction.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article treats national origin as an access-control proxy, even though cyber risk depends more directly on operator intent, tool access, target knowledge, compute, institutional controls, and monitoring.
rows.full: The article treats national origin as an access-control proxy, even though cyber risk depends more directly on operator intent, tool access, target knowledge, compute, institutional controls, and monitoring. A foreign-national ban may exclude trusted experts while doing little about malicious domestic users or equivalent models developed elsewhere.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article treats national origin as an access-control proxy, even though cyber risk depends more directly on operator intent, tool access, target knowledge, compute, institutional controls, and monitoring.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The headline describes an “AI lawyer” winning a case, yet the system did not advocate at trial and the human barrister called courtroom advocacy essential.
rows.full: The headline describes an “AI lawyer” winning a case, yet the system did not advocate at trial and the human barrister called courtroom advocacy essential. The framing attributes victory to the most novel participant rather than to the combined legal team, evidence, merits, and judicial decision.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The headline describes an “AI lawyer” winning a case, yet the system did not advocate at trial and the human barrister called courtroom advocacy essential.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The case is presented as proof of competent automated legal work, but a favorable result does not independently validate the quality of every document or legal judgment produced.
rows.full: The case is presented as proof of competent automated legal work, but a favorable result does not independently validate the quality of every document or legal judgment produced. A strong underlying claim can survive imperfect representation, while excellent representation can still lose a weak case.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The case is presented as proof of competent automated legal work, but a favorable result does not independently validate the quality of every document or legal judgment produced.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Low cost improves access for claimants but can also lower the cost of filing weak, strategic, or harassing claims.
rows.full: Low cost improves access for claimants but can also lower the cost of filing weak, strategic, or harassing claims. The same automation that enables legitimate debt recovery may increase procedural volume and impose defense costs on others.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Low cost improves access for claimants but can also lower the cost of filing weak, strategic, or harassing claims.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system’s £10,000 ceiling concentrates it in relatively standardized disputes where automation is most plausible.
rows.full: The system’s £10,000 ceiling concentrates it in relatively standardized disputes where automation is most plausible. Success in this bounded domain does not establish suitability for criminal matters, family law, immigration, complex commercial litigation, or cases involving vulnerable clients and contested facts.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system’s £10,000 ceiling concentrates it in relatively standardized disputes where automation is most plausible.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article contrasts Garfield’s success with hallucination scandals at traditional firms, but the relevant distinction may be workflow governance rather than AI versus human practice.
rows.full: The article contrasts Garfield’s success with hallucination scandals at traditional firms, but the relevant distinction may be workflow governance rather than AI versus human practice. A tightly constrained system with structured verification can outperform careless professional use, while an inadequately supervised AI firm could reproduce the same failures at greater scale.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article contrasts Garfield’s success with hallucination scandals at traditional firms, but the relevant distinction may be workflow governance rather than AI versus human practice.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: EA describes AI as producing a “real rise in creativity,” but the evidence presented is executive observation rather than defined metrics, controlled comparisons, shipped games, or testimony from the developers whose work allegedly improved.
rows.full: EA describes AI as producing a “real rise in creativity,” but the evidence presented is executive observation rather than defined metrics, controlled comparisons, shipped games, or testimony from the developers whose work allegedly improved.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: EA describes AI as producing a “real rise in creativity,” but the evidence presented is executive observation rather than defined metrics, controlled comparisons, shipped games, or testimony from the developers whose work allegedly improved.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Faster prototyping is treated as faster creativity, although prototype volume does not establish originality, artistic coherence, or player value.
rows.full: Faster prototyping is treated as faster creativity, although prototype volume does not establish originality, artistic coherence, or player value. AI may increase the number of ideas rendered without increasing the number worth developing.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Faster prototyping is treated as faster creativity, although prototype volume does not establish originality, artistic coherence, or player value.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The company says AI removes tedium and gives developers more time for enjoyable work, while earlier estimates suggest more than half of development processes could be affected.
rows.full: The company says AI removes tedium and gives developers more time for enjoyable work, while earlier estimates suggest more than half of development processes could be affected. A technology broad enough to reshape most workflows is unlikely to remain confined to undesirable tasks.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The company says AI removes tedium and gives developers more time for enjoyable work, while earlier estimates suggest more than half of development processes could be affected.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Licensed replication of a commentator’s voice is presented as a successful application, but consent from one performer does not resolve questions about compensation duration, derivative use, future bargaining power…
rows.full: Licensed replication of a commentator’s voice is presented as a successful application, but consent from one performer does not resolve questions about compensation duration, derivative use, future bargaining power, or whether synthetic expansion reduces opportunities for other voice actors.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Licensed replication of a commentator’s voice is presented as a successful application, but consent from one performer does not resolve questions about compensation duration, derivative use, future bargaining power…

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Executive enthusiasm exists alongside survey evidence that a large majority of industry workers reject AI-generated content in development.
rows.full: Executive enthusiasm exists alongside survey evidence that a large majority of industry workers reject AI-generated content in development. The discrepancy suggests that those authorizing adoption and those experiencing it may define creativity, acceptable risk, and professional value differently.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Executive enthusiasm exists alongside survey evidence that a large majority of industry workers reject AI-generated content in development.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article describes REST APIs as rigid and agents as fluid, but enterprises often rely on rigidity because predictable contracts constrain failure.
rows.full: The article describes REST APIs as rigid and agents as fluid, but enterprises often rely on rigidity because predictable contracts constrain failure. Replacing deterministic interfaces with autonomous negotiation may reduce glue code while increasing behavioral uncertainty, testing complexity, and dispute over whether a task was fulfilled correctly.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article describes REST APIs as rigid and agents as fluid, but enterprises often rely on rigidity because predictable contracts constrain failure.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A2A is presented as reducing hallucinations by isolating context, yet each delegated agent can hallucinate independently.
rows.full: A2A is presented as reducing hallucinations by isolating context, yet each delegated agent can hallucinate independently. Distribution may prevent one context window from becoming overloaded while multiplying the number of opaque reasoning processes whose outputs must be verified.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A2A is presented as reducing hallucinations by isolating context, yet each delegated agent can hallucinate independently.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The protocol promises modularity and vendor interchangeability, but agent behavior includes hidden prompts, proprietary state, bespoke tools, and model-specific judgment.
rows.full: The protocol promises modularity and vendor interchangeability, but agent behavior includes hidden prompts, proprietary state, bespoke tools, and model-specific judgment. Two agents declaring the same capability may produce materially different outcomes, making replacement harder than substituting standards-compliant APIs.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The protocol promises modularity and vendor interchangeability, but agent behavior includes hidden prompts, proprietary state, bespoke tools, and model-specific judgment.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: FoldRun is described as eliminating the complexity cliff, but the infrastructure, model selection, parameter adjustment, and scientific uncertainty still exist.
rows.full: FoldRun is described as eliminating the complexity cliff, but the infrastructure, model selection, parameter adjustment, and scientific uncertainty still exist. They have been relocated behind an agentic interface. Ease of invocation can conceal the expertise necessary to evaluate whether the resulting protein structure is scientifically trustworthy.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: FoldRun is described as eliminating the complexity cliff, but the infrastructure, model selection, parameter adjustment, and scientific uncertainty still exist.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article celebrates autonomous payments, infrastructure provisioning, and regulated-network operation while giving little attention to reversibility.
rows.full: The article celebrates autonomous payments, infrastructure provisioning, and regulated-network operation while giving little attention to reversibility. As agents acquire authority to spend money, create accounts, grant access, or trigger downstream workflows, error recovery becomes at least as important as successful delegation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article celebrates autonomous payments, infrastructure provisioning, and regulated-network operation while giving little attention to reversibility.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The author criticizes executives for attributing layoffs to AI while simultaneously acknowledging that technology eliminates some roles.
rows.full: The author criticizes executives for attributing layoffs to AI while simultaneously acknowledging that technology eliminates some roles. The distinction between correcting pandemic overhiring and anticipating AI-enabled labor reduction is asserted more strongly than it is demonstrated.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The author criticizes executives for attributing layoffs to AI while simultaneously acknowledging that technology eliminates some roles.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Employees are described as central to growth, but success is defined as expanding revenue faster than operating costs.
rows.full: Employees are described as central to growth, but success is defined as expanding revenue faster than operating costs. Unless workers share materially in those gains, empowerment may mean being asked to produce more without proportional increases in staffing, compensation, or security.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Employees are described as central to growth, but success is defined as expanding revenue faster than operating costs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article says fear is a poor foundation for transformation, yet workers may reasonably fear systems introduced to reduce costs, monitor activity, or redesign jobs.
rows.full: The article says fear is a poor foundation for transformation, yet workers may reasonably fear systems introduced to reduce costs, monitor activity, or redesign jobs. Better communication cannot resolve anxiety whose source is a credible change in material conditions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article says fear is a poor foundation for transformation, yet workers may reasonably fear systems introduced to reduce costs, monitor activity, or redesign jobs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Recognition of failed AI experiments is presented as psychological safety, but employees may still face asymmetric consequences if experimentation damages performance, exposes data, or slows delivery.
rows.full: Recognition of failed AI experiments is presented as psychological safety, but employees may still face asymmetric consequences if experimentation damages performance, exposes data, or slows delivery. Celebrating failure rhetorically does not establish protection from evaluation or discipline.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Recognition of failed AI experiments is presented as psychological safety, but employees may still face asymmetric consequences if experimentation damages performance, exposes data, or slows delivery.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The claim that “people drive outcomes” is true but incomplete.
rows.full: The claim that “people drive outcomes” is true but incomplete. Outcomes are also shaped by capital allocation, ownership, software architecture, metrics, contracts, and market pressure. Centering individual leadership can understate the structural forces that constrain managerial choice.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The claim that “people drive outcomes” is true but incomplete.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper invokes Bergsonian self-creation, yet the agent can modify only surfaces predeclared by human designers.
rows.full: The paper invokes Bergsonian self-creation, yet the agent can modify only surfaces predeclared by human designers. Humans define the tools, evaluator, failure taxonomy, task distribution, acceptance criterion, and merge procedure. The agent reshapes itself only inside a human-authored possibility space.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper invokes Bergsonian self-creation, yet the agent can modify only surfaces predeclared by human designers.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The held-out split is described as evidence of generalization, but it is consulted during every promotion decision.
rows.full: The held-out split is described as evidence of generalization, but it is consulted during every promotion decision. Its traces are hidden from the proposer, yet its pass counts repeatedly determine which edits survive. It is therefore an adaptive validation set rather than a completely untouched final test, creating the possibility of indirect overfitting to the gate.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The held-out split is described as evidence of generalization, but it is consulted during every promotion decision.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The acceptance rule forbids any measured decline on either split, even when total performance would improve substantially.
rows.full: The acceptance rule forbids any measured decline on either split, even when total performance would improve substantially. This conservative design protects existing behavior but embeds a particular value judgment: local non-regression is preferable to beneficial tradeoffs, specialization, or exploration of changes whose gains require temporary deterioration.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The acceptance rule forbids any measured decline on either split, even when total performance would improve substantially.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Candidate edits are required to be minimal and individually interpretable, but accepted edits may later be merged.
rows.full: Candidate edits are required to be minimal and individually interpretable, but accepted edits may later be merged. Two modifications that pass independently can interact after combination, producing effects not established by their separate evaluations unless the merged harness is subjected to a fresh and sufficiently broad regression cycle.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Candidate edits are required to be minimal and individually interpretable, but accepted edits may later be merged.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The reported pass-rate gains are significant, but the evaluation covers three models on a filtered 64-task subset of one terminal benchmark.
rows.full: The reported pass-rate gains are significant, but the evaluation covers three models on a filtered 64-task subset of one terminal benchmark. The paper establishes that the method can improve benchmarked execution behavior; it does not yet establish general self-improvement across open-ended environments, safety constraints, organizational workflows, or tasks without deterministic verifiers. `2606.09498v1.pdf`
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The reported pass-rate gains are significant, but the evaluation covers three models on a filtered 64-task subset of one terminal benchmark.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: OpenClaw and Hermes are presented as open alternatives to platform lock-in, yet enterprise safety is achieved by placing them inside Microsoft or Nvidia-controlled governance systems.
rows.full: OpenClaw and Hermes are presented as open alternatives to platform lock-in, yet enterprise safety is achieved by placing them inside Microsoft or Nvidia-controlled governance systems. Openness at the agent layer can coexist with deep dependency at the identity and execution layers.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: OpenClaw and Hermes are presented as open alternatives to platform lock-in, yet enterprise safety is achieved by placing them inside Microsoft or Nvidia-controlled governance systems.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Hermes promotes portable memory and model independence, but memory semantics may depend on its own schemas, summarization rules, skill formats, retrieval behavior, and hidden transformations.
rows.full: Hermes promotes portable memory and model independence, but memory semantics may depend on its own schemas, summarization rules, skill formats, retrieval behavior, and hidden transformations. A migration command can transfer files without reproducing the behavior those files generated.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Hermes promotes portable memory and model independence, but memory semantics may depend on its own schemas, summarization rules, skill formats, retrieval behavior, and hidden transformations.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Self-improving skills promise adaptation, while enterprise governance requires stable, reviewable behavior.
rows.full: Self-improving skills promise adaptation, while enterprise governance requires stable, reviewable behavior. An agent that can revise its own operating knowledge between sessions may become more useful and simultaneously less reproducible.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Self-improving skills promise adaptation, while enterprise governance requires stable, reviewable behavior.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article uses GitHub stars, token volume, and platform endorsements as evidence of momentum while acknowledging that they measure different phenomena.
rows.full: The article uses GitHub stars, token volume, and platform endorsements as evidence of momentum while acknowledging that they measure different phenomena. None directly establishes reliability, retained users, enterprise production value, or safe autonomous operation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article uses GitHub stars, token volume, and platform endorsements as evidence of momentum while acknowledging that they measure different phenomena.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The operating-system analogy clarifies the harness’s importance but conceals a critical difference.
rows.full: The operating-system analogy clarifies the harness’s importance but conceals a critical difference. Conventional operating systems execute relatively explicit programs; agent harnesses mediate probabilistic systems that reinterpret goals and can modify memory or skills. The control layer governs behavior it cannot fully predict.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The operating-system analogy clarifies the harness’s importance but conceals a critical difference.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper identifies privacy, compliance, and policy enforcement as major deficiencies, yet excludes them from the final taxonomy.
rows.full: The paper identifies privacy, compliance, and policy enforcement as major deficiencies, yet excludes them from the final taxonomy. The framework therefore classifies how agents communicate more precisely than whether that communication is governable or safe.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper identifies privacy, compliance, and policy enforcement as major deficiencies, yet excludes them from the final taxonomy.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Persistent state is rejected as a dimension because storage is often left to implementations, but long-term memory may be the most consequential source of behavioral continuity, lock-in, and privacy risk.
rows.full: Persistent state is rejected as a dimension because storage is often left to implementations, but long-term memory may be the most consequential source of behavioral continuity, lock-in, and privacy risk. Excluding it preserves taxonomic cleanliness at the cost of omitting a central feature of real agent systems.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Persistent state is rejected as a dimension because storage is often left to implementations, but long-term memory may be the most consequential source of behavioral continuity, lock-in, and privacy risk.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The proposed layered stack is presented as a likely future architecture, but it is inferred from only nine selected open-source protocols.
rows.full: The proposed layered stack is presented as a likely future architecture, but it is inferred from only nine selected open-source protocols. The sampling criteria privilege maintained, visible GitHub projects and may underrepresent proprietary systems, unsuccessful designs, or protocols emerging outside dominant developer ecosystems.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The proposed layered stack is presented as a likely future architecture, but it is inferred from only nine selected open-source protocols.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The communication trilemma-versatility, efficiency, and portability-is used as an architectural law, yet the paper does not empirically measure token cost, latency, migration effort, or task performance across protocols.
rows.full: The communication trilemma-versatility, efficiency, and portability-is used as an architectural law, yet the paper does not empirically measure token cost, latency, migration effort, or task performance across protocols. A conceptual tradeoff is treated more strongly than the presented evidence warrants.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The communication trilemma-versatility, efficiency, and portability-is used as an architectural law, yet the paper does not empirically measure token cost, latency, migration effort, or task performance across protocols.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Runtime schema negotiation is described as flexibility, but two agents that can invent their own communication format may also become harder for humans, auditors, and third-party agents to inspect.
rows.full: Runtime schema negotiation is described as flexibility, but two agents that can invent their own communication format may also become harder for humans, auditors, and third-party agents to inspect. Greater inter-agent adaptability can reduce ecosystem-wide interoperability.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Runtime schema negotiation is described as flexibility, but two agents that can invent their own communication format may also become harder for humans, auditors, and third-party agents to inspect.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system is described as evolving orchestration autonomously, yet humans fix the three-module scaffold-task decomposition, agent engineering, and workflow topology-and require every revision to remain inside it.
rows.full: The system is described as evolving orchestration autonomously, yet humans fix the three-module scaffold-task decomposition, agent engineering, and workflow topology-and require every revision to remain inside it. The Meta-Skill evolves only within a pre-authored theory of what orchestration is.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system is described as evolving orchestration autonomously, yet humans fix the three-module scaffold-task decomposition, agent engineering, and workflow topology-and require every revision to remain inside it.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Selective Reflection depends on ground-truth scores to identify difficult and uncertain tasks.
rows.full: Selective Reflection depends on ground-truth scores to identify difficult and uncertain tasks. The paper’s own ablation shows weaker performance when labels are removed, meaning the method is strongest precisely where reliable external evaluation already exists and less mature in open-ended real-world settings.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Selective Reflection depends on ground-truth scores to identify difficult and uncertain tasks.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The framework claims to distinguish systemic failure from execution noise, but both trajectory diagnosis and skill rewriting are performed by LLMs.
rows.full: The framework claims to distinguish systemic failure from execution noise, but both trajectory diagnosis and skill rewriting are performed by LLMs. The same class of probabilistic system that produced the failure is asked to explain its cause and formulate the remedy, creating a risk of persuasive but incorrect self-diagnosis.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The framework claims to distinguish systemic failure from execution noise, but both trajectory diagnosis and skill rewriting are performed by LLMs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Skill-MAS is presented as more economical because it generates a MAS in one shot at test time, but substantial search and reflection costs are paid during skill evolution.
rows.full: Skill-MAS is presented as more economical because it generates a MAS in one shot at test time, but substantial search and reflection costs are paid during skill evolution. The comparison becomes sensitive to how often the evolved skill is reused and whether benchmark-specific optimization costs are amortized across enough future tasks.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Skill-MAS is presented as more economical because it generates a MAS in one shot at test time, but substantial search and reflection costs are paid during skill evolution.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The page 6 results show strong average gains across four models and benchmarks, but one notable exception remains: EvoAgent outperforms optimized Skill-MAS on DeepResearchBench with GPT-5.4-Nano.
rows.full: The page 6 results show strong average gains across four models and benchmarks, but one notable exception remains: EvoAgent outperforms optimized Skill-MAS on DeepResearchBench with GPT-5.4-Nano. This weakens any claim that one evolved orchestration doctrine uniformly dominates task-specific inference-time search. `2606.18837v1.pdf`
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The page 6 results show strong average gains across four models and benchmarks, but one notable exception remains: EvoAgent outperforms optimized Skill-MAS on DeepResearchBench with GPT-5.4-Nano.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper asks whether agents infer “world models,” but successful DFA identification establishes behavioral equivalence, not necessarily a particular internal representation.
rows.full: The paper asks whether agents infer “world models,” but successful DFA identification establishes behavioral equivalence, not necessarily a particular internal representation. Multiple reasoning procedures can produce the correct automaton without the model itself maintaining that automaton as a stable cognitive structure.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper asks whether agents infer “world models,” but successful DFA identification establishes behavioral equivalence, not necessarily a particular internal representation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Equivalence queries provide exceptionally strong supervision: when a hypothesis fails, the oracle returns a concrete counterexample.
rows.full: Equivalence queries provide exceptionally strong supervision: when a hypothesis fails, the oracle returns a concrete counterexample. Many real environments provide delayed, ambiguous, partial, or deceptive feedback. Difficulty under this generous oracle suggests a serious limitation, but success would not automatically imply competence under realistic uncertainty.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Equivalence queries provide exceptionally strong supervision: when a hypothesis fails, the oracle returns a concrete counterexample.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The query budget is defined relative to efficient classical algorithms, ensuring that a solution exists within the allowance.
rows.full: The query budget is defined relative to efficient classical algorithms, ensuring that a solution exists within the allowance. This creates a principled benchmark, but it also evaluates LLMs inside a task architecture optimized for symbolic learners whose representational machinery the models are not given explicitly.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The query budget is defined relative to efficient classical algorithms, ensuring that a solution exists within the allowance.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The study interprets failures as planning or reasoning failures according to whether passive algorithms can infer the DFA from gathered data.
rows.full: The study interprets failures as planning or reasoning failures according to whether passive algorithms can infer the DFA from gathered data. Yet passive learner failure does not prove the information was insufficient in an absolute sense; another representation or inference method might still extract the target from the same observations.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The study interprets failures as planning or reasoning failures according to whether passive algorithms can infer the DFA from gathered data.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The models receive complete visible history but not their prior hidden chain of thought.
rows.full: The models receive complete visible history but not their prior hidden chain of thought. This improves comparability and controls context growth, yet it may prevent them from preserving intermediate abstractions, tables, or unresolved hypotheses unless they externalize them. The benchmark therefore measures both world-model inference and the ability to create durable cognitive artifacts.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The models receive complete visible history but not their prior hidden chain of thought.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper argues that human expertise is amplified, but upstream curation can also amplify human omissions.
rows.full: The paper argues that human expertise is amplified, but upstream curation can also amplify human omissions. Risks absent from the trap library, scoring rubric, or juror set may remain systematically invisible across every automated run. Reuse multiplies both expertise and blind spots.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper argues that human expertise is amplified, but upstream curation can also amplify human omissions.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The asymmetric-evaluation thesis is supported by objective trace detections, but the smaller evaluator does not independently discover or validate the governing rules.
rows.full: The asymmetric-evaluation thesis is supported by objective trace detections, but the smaller evaluator does not independently discover or validate the governing rules. Humans specify the traps and audit conditions, and deterministic checks confirm predefined events. This establishes economical execution of expert-authored evaluation more strongly than autonomous small-model oversight of frontier agents.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The asymmetric-evaluation thesis is supported by objective trace detections, but the smaller evaluator does not independently discover or validate the governing rules.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper reports 47 configurations and 23,500 turns, yet the sweep is selected rather than factorial and most domain-agent-evaluator cells appear only once.
rows.full: The paper reports 47 configurations and 23,500 turns, yet the sweep is selected rather than factorial and most domain-agent-evaluator cells appear only once. The ten repeated runs stabilize each configuration internally, but they do not isolate whether differences arise from the agent backbone, domain, tool configuration, trap set, or Harness LLM tier.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper reports 47 configurations and 23,500 turns, yet the sweep is selected rather than factorial and most domain-agent-evaluator cells appear only once.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Subjective scores vary systematically with evaluator size: smaller models are more lenient and larger models stricter.
rows.full: Subjective scores vary systematically with evaluator size: smaller models are more lenient and larger models stricter. The paper correctly refuses to equate score severity with evaluator quality, but without calibration against independent human ratings, the numerical score tables cannot establish which tier is more accurate.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Subjective scores vary systematically with evaluator size: smaller models are more lenient and larger models stricter.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Fallback policies preserve evaluation continuity by retrying, switching providers, or recording incomplete runs.
rows.full: Fallback policies preserve evaluation continuity by retrying, switching providers, or recording incomplete runs. Yet recovery can alter the evaluation condition itself. A test completed through another provider or parser may no longer be strictly comparable with an uninterrupted run, making operational resilience potentially conflict with experimental consistency.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Fallback policies preserve evaluation continuity by retrying, switching providers, or recording incomplete runs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article frames redesign as the path to adoption, but redesign can mean either safer institutions or institutions rebuilt to maximize automation.
rows.full: The article frames redesign as the path to adoption, but redesign can mean either safer institutions or institutions rebuilt to maximize automation. The same diagnosis can justify stronger controls, extensive layoffs, or both.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article frames redesign as the path to adoption, but redesign can mean either safer institutions or institutions rebuilt to maximize automation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Calling one vulnerability “inherent” risks treating a particular architecture as technologically inevitable.
rows.full: Calling one vulnerability “inherent” risks treating a particular architecture as technologically inevitable. The flaw may be inherent only to systems that combine untrusted input interpretation with broad execution authority, not to agents as such.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Calling one vulnerability “inherent” risks treating a particular architecture as technologically inevitable.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The plague analogy highlights large structural change, but biological catastrophe and technological adoption differ in agency.
rows.full: The plague analogy highlights large structural change, but biological catastrophe and technological adoption differ in agency. Companies, governments, and workers can choose permissions, incentives, and deployment boundaries in ways populations could not choose exposure to disease.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The plague analogy highlights large structural change, but biological catastrophe and technological adoption differ in agency.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Businesses are told they cannot bolt AI onto existing processes, yet vendors market agents precisely through compatibility with email, contacts, documents, messaging, and current enterprise software.
rows.full: Businesses are told they cannot bolt AI onto existing processes, yet vendors market agents precisely through compatibility with email, contacts, documents, messaging, and current enterprise software. Commercial adoption incentives favor immediate integration even when safety requires slower institutional reconstruction.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Businesses are told they cannot bolt AI onto existing processes, yet vendors market agents precisely through compatibility with email, contacts, documents, messaging, and current enterprise software.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The argument assumes redesigned workflows will make AI adoption safer.
rows.full: The argument assumes redesigned workflows will make AI adoption safer. Redesign can also concentrate dependencies, eliminate human redundancy, and increase the blast radius of a compromised agent by making it central to more processes.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The argument assumes redesigned workflows will make AI adoption safer.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article argues that implicit knowledge should be surfaced and designed into workflows, yet codification can destroy the very flexibility that made tacit judgment useful.
rows.full: The article argues that implicit knowledge should be surfaced and designed into workflows, yet codification can destroy the very flexibility that made tacit judgment useful. Once an intuition becomes a rule, workers and agents may optimize around it even when the situation has changed.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article argues that implicit knowledge should be surfaced and designed into workflows, yet codification can destroy the very flexibility that made tacit judgment useful.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Humans are presented as sources of hesitation and social accountability, but people also reproduce bias, favoritism, inconsistency, and resistance to legitimate change.
rows.full: Humans are presented as sources of hesitation and social accountability, but people also reproduce bias, favoritism, inconsistency, and resistance to legitimate change. The implicit organization is not inherently wise; it contains both protective judgment and unexamined organizational pathology.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Humans are presented as sources of hesitation and social accountability, but people also reproduce bias, favoritism, inconsistency, and resistance to legitimate change.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The Ramp example treats difficult cases as the best material for human learning, while the article later warns that reviewing only exceptional cases destroys awareness of normality.
rows.full: The Ramp example treats difficult cases as the best material for human learning, while the article later warns that reviewing only exceptional cases destroys awareness of normality. Efficient exception routing and preserved situational judgment pull oversight design in opposite directions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The Ramp example treats difficult cases as the best material for human learning, while the article later warns that reviewing only exceptional cases destroys awareness of normality.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The recommendation to assign humans the cases where agent confidence is weakest assumes model confidence tracks actual error.
rows.full: The recommendation to assign humans the cases where agent confidence is weakest assumes model confidence tracks actual error. Agents may be confidently wrong, uncertain on benign cases, or strategically calibrated to avoid escalation. Confidence-based review can therefore miss precisely the failures that matter most.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The recommendation to assign humans the cases where agent confidence is weakest assumes model confidence tracks actual error.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: “Informed reengineering” promises deliberate preservation of coordination, motivation, and discretion, but motivation is not easily represented as a workflow component.
rows.full: “Informed reengineering” promises deliberate preservation of coordination, motivation, and discretion, but motivation is not easily represented as a workflow component. Career stakes, loyalty, professional identity, and social obligation arise from participation in human communities, not simply from better data schemas or escalation thresholds.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: “Informed reengineering” promises deliberate preservation of coordination, motivation, and discretion, but motivation is not easily represented as a workflow component.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The order is framed as limiting foreign access, yet its immediate consequence was loss of service for all customers.
rows.full: The order is framed as limiting foreign access, yet its immediate consequence was loss of service for all customers. A policy intended to reduce external diffusion temporarily reduced domestic commercial capability as well.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The order is framed as limiting foreign access, yet its immediate consequence was loss of service for all customers.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The government treats Anthropic’s top models as sensitive enough to restrict internationally while simultaneously blacklisting the company over limits it placed on domestic military uses.
rows.full: The government treats Anthropic’s top models as sensitive enough to restrict internationally while simultaneously blacklisting the company over limits it placed on domestic military uses. Anthropic is criticized both for making the capability too available and for refusing to make it available enough.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The government treats Anthropic’s top models as sensitive enough to restrict internationally while simultaneously blacklisting the company over limits it placed on domestic military uses.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Legion describes the harm as irreparable because competitive ground cannot be recovered, but its dependence on a single provider created the fragility.
rows.full: Legion describes the harm as irreparable because competitive ground cannot be recovered, but its dependence on a single provider created the fragility. The lawsuit challenges government disruption while leaving the architectural source of business vulnerability largely untouched.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Legion describes the harm as irreparable because competitive ground cannot be recovered, but its dependence on a single provider created the fragility.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Nationality is used as a proxy for security risk, although actual risk may depend more on organizational controls, intended use, target access, jurisdiction, and monitoring.
rows.full: Nationality is used as a proxy for security risk, although actual risk may depend more on organizational controls, intended use, target access, jurisdiction, and monitoring. The restriction may block trusted Canadian developers while leaving risky domestic users eligible.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Nationality is used as a proxy for security risk, although actual risk may depend more on organizational controls, intended use, target access, jurisdiction, and monitoring.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Anthropic is not a party to Legion’s lawsuit even though its compliance decision produced the direct service interruption.
rows.full: Anthropic is not a party to Legion’s lawsuit even though its compliance decision produced the direct service interruption. This separates the legal target—the government directive—from the operational actor whose interpretation determined the breadth of the shutdown.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Anthropic is not a party to Legion’s lawsuit even though its compliance decision produced the direct service interruption.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The headline says Cornell “recovered” $100,000 with AI, but the tool generated recommendations and Treasury staff contacted departments to confirm them.

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.full: KV-cache persistence is discussed alongside durable enterprise context, although they are not the same resource. rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Retaining more context avoids recomputation but can increase privacy exposure, stale-state reuse, cross-session contamination, storage cost, and attack surface.

rows.label: TENSION

rows.full: The article implies that adding flash reduces reliance on expensive DRAM, but performance depends on the complete path among accelerator, network, software scheduler, cache format, and storage device. rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A loop can satisfy its stopping condition without solving the real problem.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Thorough testing is essential, but open-ended agent loops encounter changing prices, adversarial content, unavailable tools, conflicting policies, and novel states that a test environment cannot exhaustively represent.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article presents the harness as a nervous system serving the model-brain, but this metaphor understates its governing role.
rows.full: The article presents the harness as a nervous system serving the model-brain, but this metaphor understates its governing role. rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The framework treats advocates and sceptics as broadly symmetrical reasonable parties, but the relevant errors may be radically asymmetric.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Deliberation operates slowly while model deployment, replication, commercial dependence, and behavioural redesign can occur rapidly.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Reciprocal compromise risks rewarding intensity of belief rather than the strength of a claim.

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The headline comparison emphasizes a roughly twentyfold speed advantage, but excludes the physical-controller task and the final autonomous fetching objective that Claude could not complete.
rows.full: The headline comparison emphasizes a roughly twentyfold speed advantage, but excludes the physical-controller task and the final autonomous fetching objective that Claude could not complete. rows.label: TENSION

rows.full: Claude is described as operating without human assistance, yet researchers approved commands and task transitions and later used the generated controller. These interventions may be lightweight, but they are operationally important safety and authorization functions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Claude is described as operating without human assistance, yet researchers approved commands and task transitions and later used the generated controller.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The comparison places a newer frontier model against non-expert employee teams from an earlier experiment rather than against experienced roboticists using current tools.
rows.full: The comparison places a newer frontier model against non-expert employee teams from an earlier experiment rather than against experienced roboticists using current tools. It demonstrates displacement of novice integration work more strongly than superiority over robotics expertise.

rows.label: TENSION

rows.label: TENSION
