rows.kernel: The page describes reinforcement learning as giving models the ability to “reason for themselves.” RL optimizes behavior against rewards; it does not by itself establish reasoning, self-understanding, or reliable internal deliberation.
rows.full: The page describes reinforcement learning as giving models the ability to “reason for themselves.” RL optimizes behavior against rewards; it does not by itself establish reasoning, self-understanding, or reliable internal deliberation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The page describes reinforcement learning as giving models the ability to “reason for themselves.” RL optimizes behavior against rewards; it does not by itself establish reasoning, self-understanding, or reliable internal deliberation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system is promoted as accelerating development from years to months, but the hidden labor of data acquisition, annotation, simulator calibration, safety evaluation, hardware integration, and domain validation remains substantial.
rows.full: The system is promoted as accelerating development from years to months, but the hidden labor of data acquisition, annotation, simulator calibration, safety evaluation, hardware integration, and domain validation remains substantial.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system is promoted as accelerating development from years to months, but the hidden labor of data acquisition, annotation, simulator calibration, safety evaluation, hardware integration, and domain validation remains substantial.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: DeepMind defines a world model as predicting how an environment evolves and how actions affect it, but the demonstrated action space is mostly navigation.
rows.full: DeepMind defines a world model as predicting how an environment evolves and how actions affect it, but the demonstrated action space is mostly navigation. Locomotion through generated scenery is a weaker test than manipulating objects, operating tools, or causing irreversible physical changes.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: DeepMind defines a world model as predicting how an environment evolves and how actions affect it, but the demonstrated action space is mostly navigation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Promptable world events are described as counterfactual interventions, yet they are often externally imposed scene edits rather than consequences of agent action.
rows.full: Promptable world events are described as counterfactual interventions, yet they are often externally imposed scene edits rather than consequences of agent action. Changing the weather through a prompt does not test whether the model understands how an agent could cause or respond to that change.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Promptable world events are described as counterfactual interventions, yet they are often externally imposed scene edits rather than consequences of agent action.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system is praised for consistency lasting several minutes, while one minute of visual memory and a few minutes of interaction remain extremely short relative to real tasks, institutions, journeys, or embodied learning.
rows.full: The system is praised for consistency lasting several minutes, while one minute of visual memory and a few minutes of interaction remain extremely short relative to real tasks, institutions, journeys, or embodied learning.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system is praised for consistency lasting several minutes, while one minute of visual memory and a few minutes of interaction remain extremely short relative to real tasks, institutions, journeys, or embodied learning.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Frame-by-frame generation allows rich dynamic environments but also creates compounding error.
rows.full: Frame-by-frame generation allows rich dynamic environments but also creates compounding error. The same autoregressive process that supports interactivity can gradually rewrite geometry, identity, and causal history.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Frame-by-frame generation allows rich dynamic environments but also creates compounding error.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The comparison with NeRFs and Gaussian splatting emphasizes dynamism, but explicit 3D representations offer inspectable geometry and stronger viewpoint consistency.
rows.full: The comparison with NeRFs and Gaussian splatting emphasizes dynamism, but explicit 3D representations offer inspectable geometry and stronger viewpoint consistency. Genie trades structural certainty for generative flexibility.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The comparison with NeRFs and Gaussian splatting emphasizes dynamism, but explicit 3D representations offer inspectable geometry and stronger viewpoint consistency.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The model is presented as useful for embodied-agent training, yet its environments may lack stable affordances, collision rules, object properties, and reproducible transitions.
rows.full: The model is presented as useful for embodied-agent training, yet its environments may lack stable affordances, collision rules, object properties, and reproducible transitions. An agent could learn to navigate visual regularities that do not correspond to any dependable mechanics.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The model is presented as useful for embodied-agent training, yet its environments may lack stable affordances, collision rules, object properties, and reproducible transitions.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The natural-world examples demonstrate striking appearance, not validated ecology or physics.
rows.full: The natural-world examples demonstrate striking appearance, not validated ecology or physics. A convincing hurricane, jellyfish swarm, or volcanic terrain does not establish accurate fluid dynamics, animal behavior, material risk, or sensor response.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The natural-world examples demonstrate striking appearance, not validated ecology or physics.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system can simulate recognizable locations and historical settings while admitting geographic inaccuracy.
rows.full: The system can simulate recognizable locations and historical settings while admitting geographic inaccuracy. This creates a tension between experiential vividness and epistemic reliability, especially for education.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system can simulate recognizable locations and historical settings while admitting geographic inaccuracy.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The release frames limited access as responsible development, but restricted access also prevents independent auditing of consistency, memorization, dataset provenance, failure rates, and safety claims.
rows.full: The release frames limited access as responsible development, but restricted access also prevents independent auditing of consistency, memorization, dataset provenance, failure rates, and safety claims.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The release frames limited access as responsible development, but restricted access also prevents independent auditing of consistency, memorization, dataset provenance, failure rates, and safety claims.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The survey defines world models functionally through downstream usefulness.
rows.full: The survey defines world models functionally through downstream usefulness. This avoids equating video generation with simulation, but risks circularity: a predictive component may be called a world model whenever it improves a policy, even if it contains little interpretable environmental structure.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The survey defines world models functionally through downstream usefulness.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Low-level motor commands and high-level language instructions are both treated as “actions.” Yet a motor command intervenes physically, while an instruction specifies a desired outcome.
rows.full: Low-level motor commands and high-level language instructions are both treated as “actions.” Yet a motor command intervenes physically, while an instruction specifies a desired outcome. Conflating the two can blur the distinction between causally producing a future and merely describing one.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Low-level motor commands and high-level language instructions are both treated as “actions.” Yet a motor command intervenes physically, while an instruction specifies a desired outcome.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Tighter integration promises stronger performance but weaker diagnosis.
rows.full: Tighter integration promises stronger performance but weaker diagnosis. In a decoupled pipeline, researchers can inspect the imagined future and the inverse controller separately. In a unified backbone, prediction and action errors may be impossible to disentangle.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Tighter integration promises stronger performance but weaker diagnosis.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Latent world models avoid the cost and redundancy of pixels, but their internal predictions become harder to audit.
rows.full: Latent world models avoid the cost and redundancy of pixels, but their internal predictions become harder to audit. A representation may improve control while encoding shortcuts, spurious correlations, or embodiment-specific assumptions invisible to the evaluator.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Latent world models avoid the cost and redundancy of pixels, but their internal predictions become harder to audit.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A simulator used to train and score a policy can reward behavior that exploits simulator errors.
rows.full: A simulator used to train and score a policy can reward behavior that exploits simulator errors. High imagined return may indicate genuine competence-or successful manipulation of the model’s blind spots.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A simulator used to train and score a policy can reward behavior that exploits simulator errors.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Co-evolution can repair simulator weaknesses, but it can also create a closed epistemic circuit.
rows.full: Co-evolution can repair simulator weaknesses, but it can also create a closed epistemic circuit. If real-world testing is sparse, the policy and world model may become mutually consistent while jointly drifting away from physical reality.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Co-evolution can repair simulator weaknesses, but it can also create a closed epistemic circuit.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The literature emphasizes video because visual data scale readily, yet manipulation depends heavily on force, touch, proprioception, compliance, weight, friction, and damage.
rows.full: The literature emphasizes video because visual data scale readily, yet manipulation depends heavily on force, touch, proprioception, compliance, weight, friction, and damage. Camera-visible futures are only one slice of embodied state.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The literature emphasizes video because visual data scale readily, yet manipulation depends heavily on force, touch, proprioception, compliance, weight, friction, and damage.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Benchmark gains often compare complete systems with different backbones, data, policy heads, inference budgets, and training recipes.
rows.full: Benchmark gains often compare complete systems with different backbones, data, policy heads, inference budgets, and training recipes. It can therefore remain unclear whether improvement comes from world modeling specifically or from a larger surrounding stack.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Benchmark gains often compare complete systems with different backbones, data, policy heads, inference budgets, and training recipes.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The survey describes a trend toward foundation-scale generality while acknowledging that cross-embodiment transfer remains dependent on specific action spaces and bodies.
rows.full: The survey describes a trend toward foundation-scale generality while acknowledging that cross-embodiment transfer remains dependent on specific action spaces and bodies. A shared visual prior does not imply a shared capacity to act.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The survey describes a trend toward foundation-scale generality while acknowledging that cross-embodiment transfer remains dependent on specific action spaces and bodies.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper calls WorldDreamer a “general world model,” but action conditioning is demonstrated principally in the narrow domain of autonomous driving, using yaw and velocity.
rows.full: The paper calls WorldDreamer a “general world model,” but action conditioning is demonstrated principally in the narrow domain of autonomous driving, using yaw and velocity. Most other tasks are passive generation or editing rather than action-conditioned simulation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper calls WorldDreamer a “general world model,” but action conditioning is demonstrated principally in the narrow domain of autonomous driving, using yaw and velocity.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The claim that the model learns “general world physics and motions” is supported mainly through visual examples.
rows.full: The claim that the model learns “general world physics and motions” is supported mainly through visual examples. Smooth video, consistent framing, and plausible movement do not establish correct mass, force, collision, conservation, or causal intervention.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The claim that the model learns “general world physics and motions” is supported mainly through visual examples.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Masked-token reconstruction can exploit information from surrounding frames unavailable in real-time prediction.
rows.full: Masked-token reconstruction can exploit information from surrounding frames unavailable in real-time prediction. A model that completes a missing middle frame using both past and future context may perform well without possessing the forward dynamics needed by an acting agent.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Masked-token reconstruction can exploit information from surrounding frames unavailable in real-time prediction.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper invokes a Markovian assumption to justify predicting multiple tokens in parallel.
rows.full: The paper invokes a Markovian assumption to justify predicting multiple tokens in parallel. But many visually important events depend on long-range hidden state: prior contact, object ownership, off-screen motion, accumulated damage, or an earlier decision.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper invokes a Markovian assumption to justify predicting multiple tokens in parallel.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The same token mask is applied across frames to prevent leakage from adjacent visual similarity.
rows.full: The same token mask is applied across frames to prevent leakage from adjacent visual similarity. This reduces one shortcut but does not eliminate others, including static backgrounds, camera regularities, dataset conventions, and caption-derived priors.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The same token mask is applied across frames to prevent leakage from adjacent visual similarity.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Training simultaneously on videos and sets of independent images increases data volume, but the image batches contain no genuine temporal relation.
rows.full: Training simultaneously on videos and sets of independent images increases data volume, but the image batches contain no genuine temporal relation. The model must learn spatial statistics from one source and temporal dynamics from another without a clear guarantee that the two combine into coherent physical knowledge.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Training simultaneously on videos and sets of independent images increases data volume, but the image batches contain no genuine temporal relation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Detailed captions are generated by Gemini, meaning the visual-language relationship is partially authored by another model.
rows.full: Detailed captions are generated by Gemini, meaning the visual-language relationship is partially authored by another model. WorldDreamer may learn Gemini’s descriptive ontology and omissions as much as the underlying contents of the videos.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Detailed captions are generated by Gemini, meaning the visual-language relationship is partially authored by another model.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The self-collected dataset filters out clips with slow optical flow.
rows.full: The self-collected dataset filters out clips with slow optical flow. This favors visibly dynamic footage and may underrepresent stillness, subtle contact, gradual change, and causally important events that produce little pixel motion.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The self-collected dataset filters out clips with slow optical flow.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Parallel decoding provides major speed advantages, but committing high-confidence tokens early can lock in a globally wrong interpretation.
rows.full: Parallel decoding provides major speed advantages, but committing high-confidence tokens early can lock in a globally wrong interpretation. Confidence in local appearance is not equivalent to consistency of the complete event.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Parallel decoding provides major speed advantages, but committing high-confidence tokens early can lock in a globally wrong interpretation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper presents masked generation as a route to general world modeling, yet its outputs are only 24 frames at 192×320 resolution.
rows.full: The paper presents masked generation as a route to general world modeling, yet its outputs are only 24 frames at 192×320 resolution. The temporal and spatial horizon remains far below the scale needed for persistent interactive environments.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper presents masked generation as a route to general world modeling, yet its outputs are only 24 frames at 192×320 resolution.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A video model may know what manipulation should look like while failing to preserve the actual robot.
rows.full: A video model may know what manipulation should look like while failing to preserve the actual robot. The Veo example produces plausible motion but changes the gripper, kinematics, and arm morphology. Visual knowledge of an action category is not knowledge of this embodiment’s action possibilities.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A video model may know what manipulation should look like while failing to preserve the actual robot.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The argument that inverse dynamics is easier assumes the predicted future is correct and physically reachable.
rows.full: The argument that inverse dynamics is easier assumes the predicted future is correct and physically reachable. An elegant imagined goal can make action inference simpler while simultaneously directing the robot toward an impossible state.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The argument that inverse dynamics is easier assumes the predicted future is correct and physically reachable.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Video quality and policy quality may correlate because both improve with scale, data curation, and stronger backbones.
rows.full: Video quality and policy quality may correlate because both improve with scale, data curation, and stronger backbones. That correlation does not isolate future prediction as the causal source of better control.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Video quality and policy quality may correlate because both improve with scale, data curation, and stronger backbones.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Representation-only systems challenge the term “world-action model.” If future generation is skipped at inference and only pretrained features remain, the architecture may function more like a temporally informed policy than an active world model.
rows.full: Representation-only systems challenge the term “world-action model.” If future generation is skipped at inference and only pretrained features remain, the architecture may function more like a temporally informed policy than an active world model.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Representation-only systems challenge the term “world-action model.” If future generation is skipped at inference and only pretrained features remain, the architecture may function more like a temporally informed policy than an active world model.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Action-as-image avoids modality mismatch but introduces semantic mismatch.
rows.full: Action-as-image avoids modality mismatch but introduces semantic mismatch. Spatially averaging a synthetic frame into an action vector is computationally convenient, yet no physical reason requires motor control to possess image topology.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Action-as-image avoids modality mismatch but introduces semantic mismatch.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: WAMs promise better physical grounding while relying overwhelmingly on camera-visible evidence.
rows.full: WAMs promise better physical grounding while relying overwhelmingly on camera-visible evidence. Force, torque, friction, compliance, temperature, weight, pain, and mechanical damage may be weakly inferable or invisible in ordinary video.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: WAMs promise better physical grounding while relying overwhelmingly on camera-visible evidence.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The article presents WAMs as a second major recipe, but the strongest projected endpoint is a hybrid that combines WAM and VLA components.
rows.full: The article presents WAMs as a second major recipe, but the strongest projected endpoint is a hybrid that combines WAM and VLA components. Success may dissolve the category whose rise the article announces.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The article presents WAMs as a second major recipe, but the strongest projected endpoint is a hybrid that combines WAM and VLA components.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Reported comparisons mix different models, training corpora, parameter counts, action representations, inference budgets, embodiments, and evaluation environments.
rows.full: Reported comparisons mix different models, training corpora, parameter counts, action representations, inference budgets, embodiments, and evaluation environments. A leaderboard advantage cannot by itself identify the winning representation paradigm.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Reported comparisons mix different models, training corpora, parameter counts, action representations, inference budgets, embodiments, and evaluation environments.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Open video backbones democratize WAM research downstream while concentrating upstream power.
rows.full: Open video backbones democratize WAM research downstream while concentrating upstream power. Robotics laboratories can fine-tune the models, but only a small number of organizations can determine their datasets, tokenizers, physical priors, and representational omissions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Open video backbones democratize WAM research downstream while concentrating upstream power.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The language gives the programmer precise control over images while requiring thought at the level of memory locations, scanner positions, raster coordinates, and modulo arithmetic.
rows.full: The language gives the programmer precise control over images while requiring thought at the level of memory locations, scanner positions, raster coordinates, and modulo arithmetic. Expressive power is purchased through cognitive burden.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The language gives the programmer precise control over images while requiring thought at the level of memory locations, scanner positions, raster coordinates, and modulo arithmetic.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system describes scanners as intuitive conceptual devices, yet their behavior is constrained by machine-specific storage topology.
rows.full: The system describes scanners as intuitive conceptual devices, yet their behavior is constrained by machine-specific storage topology. Moving beyond a surface edge may wrap helically, enter unused memory, or produce unexpected coordinates. The imagined visual space and the actual computational space do not fully coincide.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system describes scanners as intuitive conceptual devices, yet their behavior is constrained by machine-specific storage topology.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The movie language abstracts animation into high-level operations, but many operations remain tied to integer grids and rectangular regions.
rows.full: The movie language abstracts animation into high-level operations, but many operations remain tied to integer grids and rectangular regions. Curves, zooms, rotations, and scaling are approximations produced through deletion, repetition, or local stepping.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The movie language abstracts animation into high-level operations, but many operations remain tied to integer grids and rectangular regions.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system allows several scanners to occupy the same square, but their internal memories may disagree after one modifies the value.
rows.full: The system allows several scanners to occupy the same square, but their internal memories may disagree after one modifies the value. Multiple agents can share a location while possessing inconsistent beliefs about its state.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system allows several scanners to occupy the same square, but their internal memories may disagree after one modifies the value.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The camera’s grey-scale image is produced through character glyphs and deliberate optical defocus.
rows.full: The camera’s grey-scale image is produced through character glyphs and deliberate optical defocus. Apparent continuous tone depends upon exploiting an output device designed for text rather than directly controlling luminance.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The camera’s grey-scale image is produced through character glyphs and deliberate optical defocus.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The system compresses repeated frames efficiently, but final temporal realization still depends on optical printing and laboratory work.
rows.full: The system compresses repeated frames efficiently, but final temporal realization still depends on optical printing and laboratory work. Digital specification does not yet eliminate the analog production chain.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The system compresses repeated frames efficiently, but final temporal realization still depends on optical printing and laboratory work.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Dynamic transformations such as dissolve and zoom are predefined algorithms rather than continuously parameterized spatial models.
rows.full: Dynamic transformations such as dissolve and zoom are predefined algorithms rather than continuously parameterized spatial models. Their cinematic appearance is flexible within narrow procedural templates.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Dynamic transformations such as dissolve and zoom are predefined algorithms rather than continuously parameterized spatial models.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The language is extensible through macros, but this extensibility can also fragment practice.
rows.full: The language is extensible through macros, but this extensibility can also fragment practice. Each programmer may create a private vocabulary whose semantics are legible only within a particular project.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The language is extensible through macros, but this extensibility can also fragment practice.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The chapter describes computers as protection from human ignorance, but this transfers judgment to whoever designs the system.
rows.full: The chapter describes computers as protection from human ignorance, but this transfers judgment to whoever designs the system. A machine cannot make a person “fail-safe” without embedding somebody’s definition of failure, acceptable conduct, and desirable life.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The chapter describes computers as protection from human ignorance, but this transfers judgment to whoever designs the system.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The language of symbiosis suggests ecological reciprocity while obscuring asymmetry.
rows.full: The language of symbiosis suggests ecological reciprocity while obscuring asymmetry. Institutions own the hardware, define access, write the software, select permissible parameters, and decide which outputs circulate.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The language of symbiosis suggests ecological reciprocity while obscuring asymmetry.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The computer is presented as liberating humanity from specialization, yet the practice described requires unusual concentrations of mathematical, engineering, artistic, and institutional expertise.
rows.full: The computer is presented as liberating humanity from specialization, yet the practice described requires unusual concentrations of mathematical, engineering, artistic, and institutional expertise. Liberation from one specialization produces dependence on an entire technical organization.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The computer is presented as liberating humanity from specialization, yet the practice described requires unusual concentrations of mathematical, engineering, artistic, and institutional expertise.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The chapter celebrates the computer as an active collaborator while repeatedly asserting that it performs only prescribed operations.
rows.full: The chapter celebrates the computer as an active collaborator while repeatedly asserting that it performs only prescribed operations. “Unexpected” output may arise from combinatorial complexity, but surprise to the artist does not itself establish autonomous judgment.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The chapter celebrates the computer as an active collaborator while repeatedly asserting that it performs only prescribed operations.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Mallary’s six levels treat removal of the human artist as the apex of cybernetic development.
rows.full: Mallary’s six levels treat removal of the human artist as the apex of cybernetic development. This confuses increasing machine autonomy with increasing aesthetic value. A system’s independence does not guarantee sensitivity, accountability, or significance.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Mallary’s six levels treat removal of the human artist as the apex of cybernetic development.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The proposed psychedelic computer can optimize or steer emotion, but the text treats this mainly as expanded consciousness.
rows.full: The proposed psychedelic computer can optimize or steer emotion, but the text treats this mainly as expanded consciousness. The same apparatus is equally a system for behavioral conditioning, persuasion, surveillance, and affective capture.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The proposed psychedelic computer can optimize or steer emotion, but the text treats this mainly as expanded consciousness.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The new artist is imagined as one individual fluent in both art and technology.
rows.full: The new artist is imagined as one individual fluent in both art and technology. This resolves communication problems by idealizing the hybrid genius while backgrounding collaboration, maintenance, institutional support, technicians, programmers, processors, and operators.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The new artist is imagined as one individual fluent in both art and technology.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Youngblood criticizes simplistic computer art whose importance derives only from its technological origin, yet his descriptions sometimes grant technological novelty an almost automatic transcendental force.
rows.full: Youngblood criticizes simplistic computer art whose importance derives only from its technological origin, yet his descriptions sometimes grant technological novelty an almost automatic transcendental force.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Youngblood criticizes simplistic computer art whose importance derives only from its technological origin, yet his descriptions sometimes grant technological novelty an almost automatic transcendental force.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The chapter’s utopian abundance assumes materials become interchangeable and knowledge becomes the unique resource.
rows.full: The chapter’s utopian abundance assumes materials become interchangeable and knowledge becomes the unique resource. Physical extraction, energy, manufacturing, labor, waste, infrastructure, and unequal access are rhetorically dissolved into information.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The chapter’s utopian abundance assumes materials become interchangeable and knowledge becomes the unique resource.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Whitney borrows music as the model for visual time while repeatedly warning against simplistic equivalence between sound and image.
rows.full: Whitney borrows music as the model for visual time while repeatedly warning against simplistic equivalence between sound and image. His theory depends on analogy but succeeds only where the analogy is not treated literally.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Whitney borrows music as the model for visual time while repeatedly warning against simplistic equivalence between sound and image.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Whole-number ratios produce clear periodic resonances, but perceptual value cannot be reduced to mathematical consonance.
rows.full: Whole-number ratios produce clear periodic resonances, but perceptual value cannot be reduced to mathematical consonance. A visually exact resonance may be aesthetically dull, while irregular motion may be highly structured and emotionally powerful.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Whole-number ratios produce clear periodic resonances, but perceptual value cannot be reduced to mathematical consonance.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: He rejects randomness as aimless motion, yet unexpected variation can create tension, rupture, and renewal.
rows.full: He rejects randomness as aimless motion, yet unexpected variation can create tension, rupture, and renewal. The real opposition is not order versus randomness, but consequential variation versus unstructured noise.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: He rejects randomness as aimless motion, yet unexpected variation can create tension, rupture, and renewal.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The theory treats resolution as emotionally central, but some temporal works deliberately sustain ambiguity, suspension, or irreconcilable conflict.
rows.full: The theory treats resolution as emotionally central, but some temporal works deliberately sustain ambiguity, suspension, or irreconcilable conflict. Not every meaningful tension seeks consonant release.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The theory treats resolution as emotionally central, but some temporal works deliberately sustain ambiguity, suspension, or irreconcilable conflict.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Whitney criticizes abstraction because it draws attention toward the objects rather than the dynamics, but his preferred geometric forms are conventionally classified as abstract.
rows.full: Whitney criticizes abstraction because it draws attention toward the objects rather than the dynamics, but his preferred geometric forms are conventionally classified as abstract. He rejects less the nonrepresentational image than an object-centered account of it.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Whitney criticizes abstraction because it draws attention toward the objects rather than the dynamics, but his preferred geometric forms are conventionally classified as abstract.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The search for innate visual harmony risks universalizing historically and culturally situated aesthetic preferences.
rows.full: The search for innate visual harmony risks universalizing historically and culturally situated aesthetic preferences. Shared sensitivity to periodicity does not establish one universal grammar of visual meaning.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The search for innate visual harmony risks universalizing historically and culturally situated aesthetic preferences.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: His field model activates all elements continuously, yet stillness can be a powerful temporal operation.
rows.full: His field model activates all elements continuously, yet stillness can be a powerful temporal operation. Absence, pause, withholding, and near-immobility may structure expectation as strongly as overt differential motion.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: His field model activates all elements continuously, yet stillness can be a powerful temporal operation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The comparison with music privileges organized temporal continuity and can marginalize cinematic operations such as discontinuity, montage, interruption, narrative ellipsis, and incompatible temporal registers.
rows.full: The comparison with music privileges organized temporal continuity and can marginalize cinematic operations such as discontinuity, montage, interruption, narrative ellipsis, and incompatible temporal registers.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The comparison with music privileges organized temporal continuity and can marginalize cinematic operations such as discontinuity, montage, interruption, narrative ellipsis, and incompatible temporal registers.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The theory describes viewer engagement as a dialogue with the composer, but the actual work is fixed before reception.
rows.full: The theory describes viewer engagement as a dialogue with the composer, but the actual work is fixed before reception. The viewer predicts and interprets, yet cannot alter the temporal system’s progression.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The theory describes viewer engagement as a dialogue with the composer, but the actual work is fixed before reception.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The metaphor of culture as a “program” clarifies how symbols guide action, but risks making people appear as machines executing inherited instructions.
rows.full: The metaphor of culture as a “program” clarifies how symbols guide action, but risks making people appear as machines executing inherited instructions. Actual cultural life includes improvisation, conflict, refusal, ambiguity, error, and deliberate rewriting of the program.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The metaphor of culture as a “program” clarifies how symbols guide action, but risks making people appear as machines executing inherited instructions.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Geertz attacks the separation of biological, psychological, social, and cultural levels, yet his own account sometimes distinguishes innate capacities from cultural realization too neatly.
rows.full: Geertz attacks the separation of biological, psychological, social, and cultural levels, yet his own account sometimes distinguishes innate capacities from cultural realization too neatly. The exact boundary remains, as he admits, unstable and interactive.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Geertz attacks the separation of biological, psychological, social, and cultural levels, yet his own account sometimes distinguishes innate capacities from cultural realization too neatly.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The essay rejects empty universals but still needs general claims about humans: plasticity, incompleteness, symbolic dependence, and cultural-biological coevolution.
rows.full: The essay rejects empty universals but still needs general claims about humans: plasticity, incompleteness, symbolic dependence, and cultural-biological coevolution. It does not abandon universality; it moves universality from content to developmental mechanism.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The essay rejects empty universals but still needs general claims about humans: plasticity, incompleteness, symbolic dependence, and cultural-biological coevolution.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Culture is presented as necessary for ordering behavior, but cultural systems can also produce disorientation, contradiction, domination, and trauma.
rows.full: Culture is presented as necessary for ordering behavior, but cultural systems can also produce disorientation, contradiction, domination, and trauma. Symbolic order is not necessarily coherent, benevolent, or collectively shared.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Culture is presented as necessary for ordering behavior, but cultural systems can also produce disorientation, contradiction, domination, and trauma.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The emphasis on becoming human through particular culture can slide toward cultural enclosure.
rows.full: The emphasis on becoming human through particular culture can slide toward cultural enclosure. Individuals inhabit multiple, overlapping, mobile, and conflicting symbolic systems rather than one bounded culture that completes them uniformly.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The emphasis on becoming human through particular culture can slide toward cultural enclosure.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Geertz treats particularity as the route to human truth, yet interpretation of particularity still depends on theoretical abstraction.
rows.full: Geertz treats particularity as the route to human truth, yet interpretation of particularity still depends on theoretical abstraction. Detail does not explain itself; the anthropologist decides which differences are consequential.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Geertz treats particularity as the route to human truth, yet interpretation of particularity still depends on theoretical abstraction.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The positive-feedback account of biological and cultural development is powerful but can become teleological.
rows.full: The positive-feedback account of biological and cultural development is powerful but can become teleological. It may appear that cultural evolution was directing humanity toward its present condition rather than producing contingent, branching, and sometimes extinct possibilities.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The positive-feedback account of biological and cultural development is powerful but can become teleological.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Culture supplies the symbolic means by which emotions are formed and recognized, but affect also exceeds explicit cultural coding through bodily states, developmental histories, and situations that resist available names.
rows.full: Culture supplies the symbolic means by which emotions are formed and recognized, but affect also exceeds explicit cultural coding through bodily states, developmental histories, and situations that resist available names.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Culture supplies the symbolic means by which emotions are formed and recognized, but affect also exceeds explicit cultural coding through bodily states, developmental histories, and situations that resist available names.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The claim that every person is a cultural artifact foregrounds formation but can understate power.
rows.full: The claim that every person is a cultural artifact foregrounds formation but can understate power. People are not only shaped by shared meanings; they are governed by unequal institutions controlling land, education, violence, records, and access to representation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The claim that every person is a cultural artifact foregrounds formation but can understate power.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Sterrett’s historical case is cumulative but circumstantial.
rows.full: Sterrett’s historical case is cumulative but circumstantial. Wittgenstein’s engineering interests, books, travel, and 1914 milieu make dimensional analysis a plausible influence, but they do not prove that it supplied the architecture of the Tractatus.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Sterrett’s historical case is cumulative but circumstantial.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The analogy between Tractarian objects and physical dimensions is illuminating but imperfect.
rows.full: The analogy between Tractarian objects and physical dimensions is illuminating but imperfect. Dimensions are abstract kinds of measurable quantity; Wittgenstein’s objects are supposed to be simple constituents of possible worlds.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The analogy between Tractarian objects and physical dimensions is illuminating but imperfect.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Physical similarity explains engineered quantitative models especially well.
rows.full: Physical similarity explains engineered quantitative models especially well. It is less obvious how the same account handles ordinary propositions about pain, promises, color, politics, jokes, or intention.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Physical similarity explains engineered quantitative models especially well.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Intertranslatability requires machines, conventions, and trained users.
rows.full: Intertranslatability requires machines, conventions, and trained users. If logical form depends upon those practices, it begins to resemble a socially maintained technique rather than an intrinsic structure shared by representations independently of their users.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Intertranslatability requires machines, conventions, and trained users.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A physically similar model preserves only selected behaviors.
rows.full: A physically similar model preserves only selected behaviors. Yet the Tractatus often appears to seek a general account of representation. The analogy may replace one universal form with many purpose-relative similarity relations.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A physically similar model preserves only selected behaviors.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The courtroom model mixes two different orders: physical causality and normative responsibility.
rows.full: The courtroom model mixes two different orders: physical causality and normative responsibility. A miniature can demonstrate that one trajectory produces a collision, but it cannot by physical similarity alone establish who was legally or morally at fault.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The courtroom model mixes two different orders: physical causality and normative responsibility.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The parallel between removing arithmetic constants from general physical equations and removing logical constants from propositions may be structurally suggestive without being philosophically identical.
rows.full: The parallel between removing arithmetic constants from general physical equations and removing logical constants from propositions may be structurally suggestive without being philosophically identical.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The parallel between removing arithmetic constants from general physical equations and removing logical constants from propositions may be structurally suggestive without being philosophically identical.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Sterrett emphasizes measurement systems as securing contact with reality, but systems of measurement are themselves historically designed, standardized, and institutionally enforced.
rows.full: Sterrett emphasizes measurement systems as securing contact with reality, but systems of measurement are themselves historically designed, standardized, and institutionally enforced. The measure is not external to culture.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Sterrett emphasizes measurement systems as securing contact with reality, but systems of measurement are themselves historically designed, standardized, and institutionally enforced.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Geertz defines symbols broadly enough to include numbers and computer programs, yet his strongest examples come from religion and art.
rows.full: Geertz defines symbols broadly enough to include numbers and computer programs, yet his strongest examples come from religion and art. The account leaves underdeveloped how scientific equations, instruments, standards, and models acquire meaning differently from ritual symbols.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Geertz defines symbols broadly enough to include numbers and computer programs, yet his strongest examples come from religion and art.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The distinction between models of and models for reality is analytically useful, but most symbolic systems perform both functions.
rows.full: The distinction between models of and models for reality is analytically useful, but most symbolic systems perform both functions. A scientific climate model describes possible futures while shaping policy; a poem represents experience while teaching perception.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The distinction between models of and models for reality is analytically useful, but most symbolic systems perform both functions.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Religion is described as clothing conceptions with factuality, but the same process occurs in law, economics, nationalism, medicine, and algorithmic classification.
rows.full: Religion is described as clothing conceptions with factuality, but the same process occurs in law, economics, nationalism, medicine, and algorithmic classification. The mechanism may be broader than religion.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Religion is described as clothing conceptions with factuality, but the same process occurs in law, economics, nationalism, medicine, and algorithmic classification.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Geertz emphasizes public symbolic systems while moods are partly embodied, pre-reflective, and resistant to articulation.
rows.full: Geertz emphasizes public symbolic systems while moods are partly embodied, pre-reflective, and resistant to articulation. Cultural symbols can organize affect without fully creating or controlling it.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Geertz emphasizes public symbolic systems while moods are partly embodied, pre-reflective, and resistant to articulation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The account suggests that ritual validates worldview through experienced coherence.
rows.full: The account suggests that ritual validates worldview through experienced coherence. But internally coherent ritual can sustain false, oppressive, or self-sealing systems that reinterpret all counterevidence as confirmation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The account suggests that ritual validates worldview through experienced coherence.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Religion responds to the threat of chaos by affirming interpretability.
rows.full: Religion responds to the threat of chaos by affirming interpretability. Yet some religious traditions cultivate mystery, contradiction, silence, or the limits of human comprehension rather than a fully intelligible order.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Religion responds to the threat of chaos by affirming interpretability.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Geertz contrasts religion with science through commitment versus doubt, but scientific communities also depend on trust, inherited authority, disciplinary ritual, and taken-for-granted instruments.
rows.full: Geertz contrasts religion with science through commitment versus doubt, but scientific communities also depend on trust, inherited authority, disciplinary ritual, and taken-for-granted instruments. Religious traditions can also contain inquiry, skepticism, and interpretive dispute.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Geertz contrasts religion with science through commitment versus doubt, but scientific communities also depend on trust, inherited authority, disciplinary ritual, and taken-for-granted instruments.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The essay treats cultural patterns as programs guiding behavior, but people can misunderstand, combine, parody, reject, or strategically perform those programs.
rows.full: The essay treats cultural patterns as programs guiding behavior, but people can misunderstand, combine, parody, reject, or strategically perform those programs. Symbolic direction is never equivalent to deterministic execution.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The essay treats cultural patterns as programs guiding behavior, but people can misunderstand, combine, parody, reject, or strategically perform those programs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The transition from symbol to disposition remains difficult to specify.
rows.full: The transition from symbol to disposition remains difficult to specify. The essay explains the relation interpretively but does not establish a causal mechanism showing how one ritual produces a durable motivation or mood in one person and not another.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The transition from symbol to disposition remains difficult to specify.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper calls the models “implicit world models,” but the experiments do not clearly distinguish an internal model of latent state from a highly accurate conditional imitation of environment response strings.
rows.full: The paper calls the models “implicit world models,” but the experiments do not clearly distinguish an internal model of latent state from a highly accurate conditional imitation of environment response strings.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper calls the models “implicit world models,” but the experiments do not clearly distinguish an internal model of latent state from a highly accurate conditional imitation of environment response strings.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Exact-match accuracy rewards literal reproduction of textual outputs.
rows.full: Exact-match accuracy rewards literal reproduction of textual outputs. It can undercount semantically correct alternatives while overvaluing environments whose responses are templated and deterministic.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Exact-match accuracy rewards literal reproduction of textual outputs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The paper argues that the models maintain hidden state, yet fuller initial configurations are supplied in some environments.
rows.full: The paper argues that the models maintain hidden state, yet fuller initial configurations are supplied in some environments. State tracking and privileged initialization contribute jointly to performance but are not fully separated.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The paper argues that the models maintain hidden state, yet fuller initial configurations are supplied in some environments.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: High consistency with strong agents partly reflects behavioral similarity to the GPT-4o policy used to collect training data.
rows.full: High consistency with strong agents partly reflects behavioral similarity to the GPT-4o policy used to collect training data. The simulator appears most faithful when the acting policy stays near the behavior of its original demonstrator.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: High consistency with strong agents partly reflects behavioral similarity to the GPT-4o policy used to collect training data.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The W2R consistency ratio is a property of a simulator-policy pair, not solely of the simulator.
rows.full: The W2R consistency ratio is a property of a simulator-policy pair, not solely of the simulator. A high ratio may result from conservative actions, easy tasks, agent adaptation, or model fidelity.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The W2R consistency ratio is a property of a simulator-policy pair, not solely of the simulator.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A consistency ratio greater than one does not mean the simulated world is “more correct” than reality.
rows.full: A consistency ratio greater than one does not mean the simulated world is “more correct” than reality. It means that actions produced during simulation happened to transfer more successfully than the agent’s original real-environment behavior.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A consistency ratio greater than one does not mean the simulated world is “more correct” than reality.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The synthetic-data experiment treats trajectories as successful according to the world model’s own predicted outcome.
rows.full: The synthetic-data experiment treats trajectories as successful according to the world model’s own predicted outcome. The same simulator therefore generates the experience and initially certifies its value, creating a potential self-confirmation loop.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The synthetic-data experiment treats trajectories as successful according to the world model’s own predicted outcome.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The early-experience experiment adds an additional supervised stage before policy training.
rows.full: The early-experience experiment adds an additional supervised stage before policy training. Without matched controls for equivalent extra data and optimization, some gains may come from additional training rather than specifically from learning environmental dynamics.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The early-experience experiment adds an additional supervised stage before policy training.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Mixed-environment training improves several tasks, but this does not yet establish a domain-general world model.
rows.full: Mixed-environment training improves several tasks, but this does not yet establish a domain-general world model. The gains may arise from regularization, shared response conventions, or reusable linguistic schemas.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Mixed-environment training improves several tasks, but this does not yet establish a domain-general world model.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Text environments reduce world interaction to discrete descriptions and commands.
rows.full: Text environments reduce world interaction to discrete descriptions and commands. Success here does not establish competence with continuous state, noisy sensing, stochastic dynamics, force, embodiment, or irreversible physical consequence.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Text environments reduce world interaction to discrete descriptions and commands.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The model returns one textual future and a binary reward.
rows.full: The model returns one textual future and a binary reward. It does not naturally expose multiple plausible outcomes, calibrated uncertainty, hidden causal variables, or probability over transitions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The model returns one textual future and a binary reward.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: If meaning consists exclusively in conceivable consequences, two conceptions with identical observable consequences become indistinguishable.
rows.full: If meaning consists exclusively in conceivable consequences, two conceptions with identical observable consequences become indistinguishable. This can erase differences in explanation, ontology, historical origin, and moral framing that may matter even when immediate predictions coincide.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: If meaning consists exclusively in conceivable consequences, two conceptions with identical observable consequences become indistinguishable.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Peirce’s appeal to conduct under every possible situation seeks universal meaning, but no investigator can enumerate every conceivable experimental consequence.
rows.full: Peirce’s appeal to conduct under every possible situation seeks universal meaning, but no investigator can enumerate every conceivable experimental consequence. The pragmatic definition may itself remain an ideal rather than an executable procedure.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Peirce’s appeal to conduct under every possible situation seeks universal meaning, but no investigator can enumerate every conceivable experimental consequence.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: James makes philosophical belief answerable to concrete experience, yet his existential examples permit temperament and preference to influence commitment where evidence is incomplete.
rows.full: James makes philosophical belief answerable to concrete experience, yet his existential examples permit temperament and preference to influence commitment where evidence is incomplete. Pragmatism can therefore appear both experimentally disciplined and personally voluntarist.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: James makes philosophical belief answerable to concrete experience, yet his existential examples permit temperament and preference to influence commitment where evidence is incomplete.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Verification explains how propositions are tested, but equating truth with verification risks confusing the means of establishing a claim with what makes the claim true.
rows.full: Verification explains how propositions are tested, but equating truth with verification risks confusing the means of establishing a claim with what makes the claim true.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Verification explains how propositions are tested, but equating truth with verification risks confusing the means of establishing a claim with what makes the claim true.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: A belief may produce its anticipated consequences because it reorganizes behavior rather than because it accurately describes an independent reality.
rows.full: A belief may produce its anticipated consequences because it reorganizes behavior rather than because it accurately describes an independent reality. Pragmatic success can become performative self-confirmation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A belief may produce its anticipated consequences because it reorganizes behavior rather than because it accurately describes an independent reality.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Dewey rejects thought as passive representation, but inquiry still requires some adequate representation of the situation being transformed.
rows.full: Dewey rejects thought as passive representation, but inquiry still requires some adequate representation of the situation being transformed. Reconstruction without sufficiently accurate description can intensify the original problem.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Dewey rejects thought as passive representation, but inquiry still requires some adequate representation of the situation being transformed.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Instrumentalism judges concepts by efficacy relative to an end, but ends themselves require evaluation.
rows.full: Instrumentalism judges concepts by efficacy relative to an end, but ends themselves require evaluation. An efficient instrument can serve a narrow, destructive, or unjust purpose.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Instrumentalism judges concepts by efficacy relative to an end, but ends themselves require evaluation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The essay gives the individual mind a privileged role as the vehicle of experimental change while also locating individuals inside natural and social environments.
rows.full: The essay gives the individual mind a privileged role as the vehicle of experimental change while also locating individuals inside natural and social environments. It underdevelops how institutions determine whose experiments are permitted and whose consequences count as evidence.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The essay gives the individual mind a privileged role as the vehicle of experimental change while also locating individuals inside natural and social environments.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Dewey describes intelligence as the guarantee of a desirable future, but intelligence cannot determine desirability by itself.
rows.full: Dewey describes intelligence as the guarantee of a desirable future, but intelligence cannot determine desirability by itself. Conflicts over values, interests, and power cannot always be resolved as technical problems.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Dewey describes intelligence as the guarantee of a desirable future, but intelligence cannot determine desirability by itself.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Deleuze rejects the claim that cinema is a language, yet constructs an elaborate taxonomy of images and signs.
rows.full: Deleuze rejects the claim that cinema is a language, yet constructs an elaborate taxonomy of images and signs. The project resists linguistic reduction while retaining the classificatory ambition of a grammar.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Deleuze rejects the claim that cinema is a language, yet constructs an elaborate taxonomy of images and signs.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The claim that image, matter, light, and movement are identical is philosophically generative but difficult to operationalize.
rows.full: The claim that image, matter, light, and movement are identical is philosophically generative but difficult to operationalize. It moves quickly between physical reality, perception, cinematic apparatus, and metaphysical ontology.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The claim that image, matter, light, and movement are identical is philosophically generative but difficult to operationalize.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The acentred universe supposedly contains no privileged viewpoint, yet the theory depends upon living centres whose intervals organize perception and action.
rows.full: The acentred universe supposedly contains no privileged viewpoint, yet the theory depends upon living centres whose intervals organize perception and action. The centre is rejected cosmologically and reintroduced biologically.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The acentred universe supposedly contains no privileged viewpoint, yet the theory depends upon living centres whose intervals organize perception and action.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Perception as subtraction explains selective attention, but it can understate constructive processes such as memory, expectation, fantasy, language, and cultural interpretation.
rows.full: Perception as subtraction explains selective attention, but it can understate constructive processes such as memory, expectation, fantasy, language, and cultural interpretation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Perception as subtraction explains selective attention, but it can understate constructive processes such as memory, expectation, fantasy, language, and cultural interpretation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The face is made the privileged vehicle of affect, although affect can also be organized through posture, rhythm, sound, landscape, colour, texture, architecture, and collective movement.
rows.full: The face is made the privileged vehicle of affect, although affect can also be organized through posture, rhythm, sound, landscape, colour, texture, architecture, and collective movement.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The face is made the privileged vehicle of affect, although affect can also be organized through posture, rhythm, sound, landscape, colour, texture, architecture, and collective movement.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The action-image is described as realism because milieus and behaviours actualize one another.
rows.full: The action-image is described as realism because milieus and behaviours actualize one another. Yet many highly stylized, fantastic, and melodramatic films also sustain this structure. “Realism” names a functional circuit more than a representational style.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The action-image is described as realism because milieus and behaviours actualize one another.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The large-form action-image risks universalizing a particularly American narrative ideology: <Situation> → <Individual_Action> → <Reformed_World>.
rows.full: The large-form action-image risks universalizing a particularly American narrative ideology: <Situation> → <Individual_Action> → <Reformed_World>. This structure can naturalize individual agency while marginalizing institutional, collective, systemic, or irresolvable conditions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The large-form action-image risks universalizing a particularly American narrative ideology: <Situation> → <Individual_Action> → <Reformed_World>.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Deleuze borrows Peirce’s Firstness, Secondness, and Thirdness but transforms them into cinematic image-types.
rows.full: Deleuze borrows Peirce’s Firstness, Secondness, and Thirdness but transforms them into cinematic image-types. The resulting system is productive, though it should not be mistaken for a straightforward application of Peirce’s semiotics.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Deleuze borrows Peirce’s Firstness, Secondness, and Thirdness but transforms them into cinematic image-types.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The historical passage from movement-image to time-image is associated with war, neorealism, and the collapse of established schemas.
rows.full: The historical passage from movement-image to time-image is associated with war, neorealism, and the collapse of established schemas. This creates a compelling periodization but can obscure earlier films that already broke sensory-motor continuity and later films that continue classical action structures.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The historical passage from movement-image to time-image is associated with war, neorealism, and the collapse of established schemas.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The crisis of effective action is treated as a source of aesthetic invention.
rows.full: The crisis of effective action is treated as a source of aesthetic invention. Politically, however, incapacitation, disorientation, and detachment may signify domination or trauma rather than liberation from cliché.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The crisis of effective action is treated as a source of aesthetic invention.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The taxonomy claims not to impose a hierarchy, yet the movement toward the direct time-image can appear evolutionary, as though classical cinema were a stage that modern cinema philosophically surpasses.
rows.full: The taxonomy claims not to impose a hierarchy, yet the movement toward the direct time-image can appear evolutionary, as though classical cinema were a stage that modern cinema philosophically surpasses.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The taxonomy claims not to impose a hierarchy, yet the movement toward the direct time-image can appear evolutionary, as though classical cinema were a stage that modern cinema philosophically surpasses.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The definition of Mitchell’s imagetext as a single latent embedding is too literal and technologically specific.
rows.full: The definition of Mitchell’s imagetext as a single latent embedding is too literal and technologically specific. Mitchell’s concept concerns the constitutive entanglement of verbal and visual media; it does not require that they be encoded as one computational vector. `Mitchell_WJT_Iconology_Image_Text_Ideology.pdf`
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The definition of Mitchell’s imagetext as a single latent embedding is too literal and technologically specific.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Multimodal systems do not necessarily store text and images as two reversible projections of one identical latent point.
rows.full: Multimodal systems do not necessarily store text and images as two reversible projections of one identical latent point. Architectures may contain separate tokenizers, encoders, cross-attention systems, diffusion latents, alignment layers, and lossy mappings.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Multimodal systems do not necessarily store text and images as two reversible projections of one identical latent point.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The claim that “holding the words is holding the parameters” overstates controllability.
rows.full: The claim that “holding the words is holding the parameters” overstates controllability. Natural-language descriptions rarely expose the complete state of a generative model, and the same prompt may yield many materially different outputs.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The claim that “holding the words is holding the parameters” overstates controllability.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Operative description is presented as though image-to-text recovery can reconstruct the specification that produced an artifact.
rows.full: Operative description is presented as though image-to-text recovery can reconstruct the specification that produced an artifact. In practice, many prompts, seeds, model states, edits, and hidden defaults can produce similar images. The process is underdetermined.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Operative description is presented as though image-to-text recovery can reconstruct the specification that produced an artifact.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Thick prompting risks confusing specified context with generated understanding.
rows.full: Thick prompting risks confusing specified context with generated understanding. A prompt may name intention, code, and stakes while the model reproduces their visual stereotypes without maintaining the underlying social relations.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Thick prompting risks confusing specified context with generated understanding.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The file sometimes treats semantic thickness as something fully supplied by the author.
rows.full: The file sometimes treats semantic thickness as something fully supplied by the author. Geertzian meaning is public, historical, contested, and enacted; it cannot always be compressed into one authoritative prompt.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The file sometimes treats semantic thickness as something fully supplied by the author.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Calling a description “operative” because it can regenerate an artifact is insufficient.
rows.full: Calling a description “operative” because it can regenerate an artifact is insufficient. True operationality requires identifiable transformations, constraints, persistence, and predictable consequences-not merely another stochastic generation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Calling a description “operative” because it can regenerate an artifact is insufficient.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The movement from image generation to world modeling is asserted too quickly.
rows.full: The movement from image generation to world modeling is asserted too quickly. A system can produce temporally plausible video without maintaining inspectable world state, stable object identity, causal laws, or action-conditioned counterfactuals.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The movement from image generation to world modeling is asserted too quickly.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The file defines imagetext too smoothly as a fused mixed representation.
rows.full: The file defines imagetext too smoothly as a fused mixed representation. Mitchell’s concept is more useful when the tension among visual and verbal operations remains active rather than being resolved into seamless unity.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The file defines imagetext too smoothly as a fused mixed representation.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The draft sometimes moves from “all media are mixed” to “text and image are two decodings of one latent representation.” The first is a media-theoretical claim; the second is an architectural claim that does not hold uniformly across multimodal systems.
rows.full: The draft sometimes moves from “all media are mixed” to “text and image are two decodings of one latent representation.” The first is a media-theoretical claim; the second is an architectural claim that does not hold uniformly across multimodal systems.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The draft sometimes moves from “all media are mixed” to “text and image are two decodings of one latent representation.” The first is a media-theoretical claim; the second is an architectural claim that does not hold uniformly across multimodal systems.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Calling the embedding itself the imagetext risks relocating the concept into an inaccessible technical interior.
rows.full: Calling the embedding itself the imagetext risks relocating the concept into an inaccessible technical interior. Mitchell’s imagetext concerns materially and culturally available relations among media, not merely hidden machine state.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Calling the embedding itself the imagetext risks relocating the concept into an inaccessible technical interior.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The text’s formal analogy- <image : image model :: world : world model> -is cleaner than- <image : image model :: video : world model>, but it remains asymmetrical.
rows.full: The text’s formal analogy- <image : image model :: world : world model> -is cleaner than- <image : image model :: video : world model>, but it remains asymmetrical. An image is an artifact; a world is a dynamic domain. The corresponding relation is not simply object-to-model in both cases.
