rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The text’s formal analogy- <image : image model :: world : world model> -is cleaner than- <image : image model :: video : world model>, but it remains asymmetrical.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The definition of video model as predicting visible continuation remains too narrow for modern systems that accept camera motion, image conditions, edits, or actions.
rows.full: The definition of video model as predicting visible continuation remains too narrow for modern systems that accept camera motion, image conditions, edits, or actions. Some video models occupy an intermediate category between passive continuation and closed-loop simulation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The definition of video model as predicting visible continuation remains too narrow for modern systems that accept camera motion, image conditions, edits, or actions.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The file gives action conditioning special status, but action conditioning alone is insufficient.
rows.full: The file gives action conditioning special status, but action conditioning alone is insufficient. A system may respond to an action token while still violating persistence, conservation, embodiment, or causal consistency.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The file gives action conditioning special status, but action conditioning alone is insufficient.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The proposed world-text is introduced before its relation to prompt, scene graph, program, simulation script, game state, and world specification is clarified.
rows.full: The proposed world-text is introduced before its relation to prompt, scene graph, program, simulation script, game state, and world specification is clarified. Without this distinction, it risks becoming a new label for already existing forms.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The proposed world-text is introduced before its relation to prompt, scene graph, program, simulation script, game state, and world specification is clarified.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The Axis Inverter draft correctly criticizes visual coherence as false evidence of simulation, but it still treats “physics” as the principal missing criterion.
rows.full: The Axis Inverter draft correctly criticizes visual coherence as false evidence of simulation, but it still treats “physics” as the principal missing criterion. Social worlds also require institutions, roles, interpretation, authority, and contested meaning.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The Axis Inverter draft correctly criticizes visual coherence as false evidence of simulation, but it still treats “physics” as the principal missing criterion.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The file oscillates between descriptive taxonomy and normative argument.
rows.full: The file oscillates between descriptive taxonomy and normative argument. Sometimes it asks what these models are; elsewhere it prescribes what should count as a world model. Those operations should be separated.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The file oscillates between descriptive taxonomy and normative argument.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The distinction between video model and world model is necessary, but the draft makes it too absolute.
rows.full: The distinction between video model and world model is necessary, but the draft makes it too absolute. Some contemporary video models accept actions, camera trajectories, edits, and environmental interventions, placing them between passive sequence generation and full simulation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The distinction between video model and world model is necessary, but the draft makes it too absolute.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Action conditioning is treated as the decisive criterion, although it is only a minimum condition.
rows.full: Action conditioning is treated as the decisive criterion, although it is only a minimum condition. A model can accept an action token while violating object permanence, conservation, embodiment, causality, or long-term state.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Action conditioning is treated as the decisive criterion, although it is only a minimum condition.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The phrase “a world model must explain what changes” overstates the requirement.
rows.full: The phrase “a world model must explain what changes” overstates the requirement. Many world models predict transitions effectively without producing explanations. Prediction, simulation, explanation, and causal identification are distinct capabilities.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The phrase “a world model must explain what changes” overstates the requirement.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The proposed extension from imagetext to worldtext is not structurally automatic.
rows.full: The proposed extension from imagetext to worldtext is not structurally automatic. Mitchell analyzes relations among representational media; a world model concerns state, intervention, and dynamics. The latter requires formal machinery absent from the former.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The proposed extension from imagetext to worldtext is not structurally automatic.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: Defining a world principally through state, actions, and transitions imports a Markov-decision-process ontology.
rows.full: Defining a world principally through state, actions, and transitions imports a Markov-decision-process ontology. Human worlds also contain memory, ambiguity, inaccessible causes, institutions, competing descriptions, and events whose significance changes retrospectively.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Defining a world principally through state, actions, and transitions imports a Markov-decision-process ontology.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The draft privileges physics as the test of worldhood.
rows.full: The draft privileges physics as the test of worldhood. Yet worlds can be legal, social, economic, ritual, narrative, or political. In such worlds, rules of authority and interpretation may matter more than mechanical dynamics.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The draft privileges physics as the test of worldhood.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The analogy “image model renders appearance” understates what image models can encode and overstates the stability of “appearance” as a category.
rows.full: The analogy “image model renders appearance” understates what image models can encode and overstates the stability of “appearance” as a category. Static images can imply causality, history, affordance, social order, and temporal consequence.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The analogy “image model renders appearance” understates what image models can encode and overstates the stability of “appearance” as a category.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The proposed worldtext risks duplicating existing concepts such as scene graph, game state, simulation script, knowledge graph, interactive fiction, executable specification, or digital twin unless its unique relation among these is made explicit.
rows.full: The proposed worldtext risks duplicating existing concepts such as scene graph, game state, simulation script, knowledge graph, interactive fiction, executable specification, or digital twin unless its unique relation among these is made explicit.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The proposed worldtext risks duplicating existing concepts such as scene graph, game state, simulation script, knowledge graph, interactive fiction, executable specification, or digital twin unless its unique relation among these is made explicit.

rows.label: TENSION
rows.kernel: The Axis Inverter draft gains force by sharpening the divide between rendering and simulation, but the polemic can conceal intermediate systems and hybrid architectures that combine learned video priors with explicit state and control.
rows.full: The Axis Inverter draft gains force by sharpening the divide between rendering and simulation, but the polemic can conceal intermediate systems and hybrid architectures that combine learned video priors with explicit state and control.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The Axis Inverter draft gains force by sharpening the divide between rendering and simulation, but the polemic can conceal intermediate systems and hybrid architectures that combine learned video priors with explicit state and control.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat prompt literacy as critical model literacy, not merely as a new form of creative writing.
rows.full: Treat prompt literacy as critical model literacy, not merely as a new form of creative writing. People should learn to distinguish between describing what they perceive, invoking a cultural stereotype and adapting their language to a platform’s hidden conventions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat prompt literacy as critical model literacy, not merely as a new form of creative writing.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Without that distinction, users may mistake successful model control for improved expressive ability.
rows.full: Without that distinction, users may mistake successful model control for improved expressive ability. Education would then train people to accommodate proprietary systems while calling the accommodation creativity. The practical priority is therefore to teach prompting alongside comparison, provenance, bias detection and reflection on what the model repeatedly refuses or fails to represent.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Without that distinction, users may mistake successful model control for improved expressive ability.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Evaluate generative AI at multiple prompting intensities rather than debating whether it is intrinsically bland.
rows.full: Evaluate generative AI at multiple prompting intensities rather than debating whether it is intrinsically bland. At minimum, separate default prompting, competent everyday prompting and expert adversarial or iterative prompting—and report the human time, expertise and number of attempts required at each level.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Evaluate generative AI at multiple prompting intensities rather than debating whether it is intrinsically bland.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Without this separation, model advocates can credit the system for expert human steering, while critics can mistake default behavior for the limit of the system’s output space.
rows.full: Without this separation, model advocates can credit the system for expert human steering, while critics can mistake default behavior for the limit of the system’s output space. A tiered evaluation would reveal the operationally important question: not whether a distinctive result can eventually be produced, but how reliably, affordably and accessibly it can be produced under realistic conditions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Without this separation, model advocates can credit the system for expert human steering, while critics can mistake default behavior for the limit of the system’s output space.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Prioritize construction of a model-independent canon operating system before expanding into additional media.
rows.full: Prioritize construction of a model-independent canon operating system before expanding into additional media. The essential artifact should be a structured source of truth containing entities, timelines, relationships, visual rules, provenance, unresolved contradictions, and approval status.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Prioritize construction of a model-independent canon operating system before expanding into additional media.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: AI makes expansion cheap enough to outrun coherence.
rows.full: AI makes expansion cheap enough to outrun coherence. Without durable canon infrastructure, every new format multiplies contradictions, revision costs, platform dependencies, and abandoned commitments. A creator who controls the world model can replace tools and regenerate outputs; a creator who controls only a pile of outputs is dependent on the tools that produced them.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: AI makes expansion cheap enough to outrun coherence.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Do not organize the adaptation around reproducing the Odyssey’s famous episodes.
rows.full: Do not organize the adaptation around reproducing the Odyssey’s famous episodes. Organize it around preserving unresolved judgment: the audience must experience Odysseus as admirable, intimate, deceptive, brutal, wounded, and sovereign without the film announcing which interpretation should dominate.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Do not organize the adaptation around reproducing the Odyssey’s famous episodes.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Spectacle is now technically abundant and therefore strategically secondary.
rows.full: Spectacle is now technically abundant and therefore strategically secondary. The film succeeds only if its form prevents viewers from converting ancient contradiction into familiar moral categories. Monsters, storms, and battles can attract an audience, but the adaptation’s lasting value depends on whether it can make identification coexist with ethical revulsion. That is the element most likely to distinguish an epic from an expensive adventure franchise.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Spectacle is now technically abundant and therefore strategically secondary.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Regulate AI deployment at the level of work organization, not merely model safety.
rows.full: Regulate AI deployment at the level of work organization, not merely model safety. Require employers to disclose whether an AI system increases worker autonomy or converts skilled employees into monitored exception-handlers; measure staffing reductions, workload intensification, error responsibility, appeal rights, and changes in professional discretion.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Regulate AI deployment at the level of work organization, not merely model safety.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Debates about whether models are intelligent, biased, accurate, or environmentally costly can leave the decisive institutional choice untouched: who captures the productivity gain and who absorbs the risk.
rows.full: Debates about whether models are intelligent, biased, accurate, or environmentally costly can leave the decisive institutional choice untouched: who captures the productivity gain and who absorbs the risk. A technically competent system can still produce reverse centaurs, while a technically weak system can still discipline labor through the threat of replacement. Governance must therefore target allocation of power rather than wait for a definitive verdict on technical performance.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Debates about whether models are intelligent, biased, accurate, or environmentally costly can leave the decisive institutional choice untouched: who captures the productivity gain and who absorbs the risk.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Do not regulate advanced cybersecurity models by prompt anecdote or by undifferentiated model access.
rows.full: Do not regulate advanced cybersecurity models by prompt anecdote or by undifferentiated model access. Require capability-based evaluation that compares offensive uplift, defensive uplift, baseline availability from other systems, operational scalability, and the effects of restrictions on authorized defenders.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Do not regulate advanced cybersecurity models by prompt anecdote or by undifferentiated model access.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The relevant question is not whether a model can produce vulnerability-related code; many tools and human experts already can.
rows.full: The relevant question is not whether a model can produce vulnerability-related code; many tools and human experts already can. The material question is whether access changes the balance between attack and defense. A restriction imposed without that comparison can remove high-quality tools from compliant defenders while leaving adversaries with substitutes, producing the opposite of the intended security outcome.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The relevant question is not whether a model can produce vulnerability-related code; many tools and human experts already can.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat provenance and editable decision structure—not prompt convenience—as the decisive requirement for neural CAD adoption.
rows.full: Treat provenance and editable decision structure—not prompt convenience—as the decisive requirement for neural CAD adoption. Every generated object should expose which constraints were supplied, which were inferred, what evidence supports performance claims, where uncertainty remains, and which later edits invalidate prior analysis.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat provenance and editable decision structure—not prompt convenience—as the decisive requirement for neural CAD adoption.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: In professional design, a geometrically convincing error can travel into procurement, fabrication, construction, certification, and physical harm.
rows.full: In professional design, a geometrically convincing error can travel into procurement, fabrication, construction, certification, and physical harm. Natural interaction will encourage earlier and broader reliance precisely because the system feels easier to use. Without inspectable inference provenance, neural CAD turns ambiguity into authoritative-looking geometry while leaving professionals responsible for decisions they may be unable to reconstruct.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: In professional design, a geometrically convincing error can travel into procurement, fabrication, construction, certification, and physical harm.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Stop treating electricity and data-center capacity as passive inputs to AI growth.
rows.full: Stop treating electricity and data-center capacity as passive inputs to AI growth. Require major projects to demonstrate marginal social value per unit of power, disclose who bears grid-upgrade costs, and compete explicitly against alternative public and industrial uses of the same electricity.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Stop treating electricity and data-center capacity as passive inputs to AI growth.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The infrastructure is being built on timelines much shorter than those required for grid expansion, regulatory review, or reliable demand forecasting.
rows.full: The infrastructure is being built on timelines much shorter than those required for grid expansion, regulatory review, or reliable demand forecasting. Once billions are committed and facilities are connected, their energy claims become politically difficult to reverse. The crucial decision is therefore not how quickly AI capacity can be constructed, but whether its expected benefits justify locking scarce power, land, water, and capital into that use before the value of the underlying workloads has been established.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The infrastructure is being built on timelines much shorter than those required for grid expansion, regulatory review, or reliable demand forecasting.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Design every tool call as an authorization request, not as an instruction to execute.
rows.full: Design every tool call as an authorization request, not as an instruction to execute. Separate model proposal, argument validation, permission checking, user confirmation, execution, and result verification—especially for tools that create irreversible external effects.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Design every tool call as an authorization request, not as an instruction to execute.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The model is probabilistic, while APIs frequently produce deterministic consequences.
rows.full: The model is probabilistic, while APIs frequently produce deterministic consequences. Without an explicit authorization boundary, a plausible linguistic interpretation can become a sent message, altered database, financial transaction, or deleted resource. The decisive engineering problem is therefore not helping the model choose tools more fluently, but preventing uncertain interpretation from becoming unreviewed action.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The model is probabilistic, while APIs frequently produce deterministic consequences.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Evaluate models as task-specific operating systems with explicit regression suites and total-cost measurements, not as entries in a single intelligence ranking.
rows.full: Evaluate models as task-specific operating systems with explicit regression suites and total-cost measurements, not as entries in a single intelligence ranking. Preserve representative prompts, expected behaviors, token use, latency, and artifact quality across every model upgrade.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Evaluate models as task-specific operating systems with explicit regression suites and total-cost measurements, not as entries in a single intelligence ranking.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Aggregate benchmark gains can conceal local deterioration, while low unit pricing can conceal expensive inference behavior.
rows.full: Aggregate benchmark gains can conceal local deterioration, while low unit pricing can conceal expensive inference behavior. Organizations that switch models based on headline rankings may discover that the new model is slower, more verbose, less reliable on distinctive tasks, or harder to operate privately. The relevant unit is not benchmark score per dollar; it is acceptable completed work per dollar under the organization’s actual constraints.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Aggregate benchmark gains can conceal local deterioration, while low unit pricing can conceal expensive inference behavior.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Stop treating “Does scaling work?” as the decisive research question.
rows.full: Stop treating “Does scaling work?” as the decisive research question. Require scaling advocates to specify which capabilities continue improving, at what marginal compute cost, under what evaluation conditions, and where architectural additions become necessary.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Stop treating “Does scaling work?” as the decisive research question.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The broad slogan combines several different claims: that larger models improve benchmarks, that they produce novel discoveries, that they will acquire reliable judgment, and that scaling remains the best investment.
rows.full: The broad slogan combines several different claims: that larger models improve benchmarks, that they produce novel discoveries, that they will acquire reliable judgment, and that scaling remains the best investment. Those propositions require different evidence. Separating them prevents a genuine success in one domain from becoming automatic justification for an entire technical and economic strategy.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The broad slogan combines several different claims: that larger models improve benchmarks, that they produce novel discoveries, that they will acquire reliable judgment, and that scaling remains the best investment.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Convert the unsuccessful federal proposal into a staged regional investment program with independently verifiable milestones, rather than waiting for another all-or-nothing grant competition.
rows.full: Convert the unsuccessful federal proposal into a staged regional investment program with independently verifiable milestones, rather than waiting for another all-or-nothing grant competition. Prioritize one industry cluster and demonstrate a complete pathway from research and procurement through firm growth to employment for existing Baltimore residents.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Convert the unsuccessful federal proposal into a staged regional investment program with independently verifiable milestones, rather than waiting for another all-or-nothing grant competition.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Baltimore’s strongest immediate asset is no longer the rejected application but the coalition and commitments assembled around it.
rows.full: Baltimore’s strongest immediate asset is no longer the rejected application but the coalition and commitments assembled around it. If those commitments dissolve while leaders pursue another large award, the bid will have produced narrative alignment without institutional durability. A smaller executable program would test whether the coalition can deliver, create evidence for future funding, and distinguish genuine regional capacity from aspirational projections.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Baltimore’s strongest immediate asset is no longer the rejected application but the coalition and commitments assembled around it.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Use LOCUS as a discovery and corpus-construction layer, not as an authoritative policy-measurement layer.
rows.full: Use LOCUS as a discovery and corpus-construction layer, not as an authoritative policy-measurement layer. Before making comparative claims, create a human-audited gold subset that restores source provenance, legal hierarchy, temporal status, document order, and jurisdictional applicability.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Use LOCUS as a discovery and corpus-construction layer, not as an authoritative policy-measurement layer.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: At this scale, systematic errors do not remain isolated annotation mistakes; they become state rankings, maps of “paternalism,” claims about local governance, and training signals for future legal systems.
rows.full: At this scale, systematic errors do not remain isolated annotation mistakes; they become state rankings, maps of “paternalism,” claims about local governance, and training signals for future legal systems. The first priority is therefore not expanding the taxonomy or training larger models. It is determining which parts of the corpus can be traced back to current, controlling law and which analytical labels survive independent human validation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: At this scale, systematic errors do not remain isolated annotation mistakes; they become state rankings, maps of “paternalism,” claims about local governance, and training signals for future legal systems.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Train the prediction–feedback loop rather than rehearsing completed performance.
rows.full: Train the prediction–feedback loop rather than rehearsing completed performance. Pause situations before their outcome, force an explicit prediction, identify the cues supporting it, reveal the result, and catalogue why incorrect predictions failed.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Train the prediction–feedback loop rather than rehearsing completed performance.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Passive exposure can produce familiarity without improving anticipation.
rows.full: Passive exposure can produce familiarity without improving anticipation. The scarce capability is not remembering what happened but detecting which early signals reliably distinguish futures that still look similar. Explicit prediction turns experience into labelled evidence, while error analysis prevents a successful pattern library from becoming rigid and exploitable.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Passive exposure can produce familiarity without improving anticipation.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Judge an explanation by the counterfactual work its model can perform.
rows.full: Judge an explanation by the counterfactual work its model can perform. A serious theory should support interventions, novel predictions, transfer across altered conditions, and discriminating experiments-not merely redescribe observations in a more precise vocabulary.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Judge an explanation by the counterfactual work its model can perform.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Craik’s central distinction is between a formulation that fits known facts and a model that can run ahead of them.
rows.full: Craik’s central distinction is between a formulation that fits known facts and a model that can run ahead of them. The latter exposes its structure to failure: change the input, interrupt a mechanism, introduce an unfamiliar condition, and observe whether the predicted consequences follow. This converts explanation from retrospective coherence into prospective risk. For a time-constrained researcher, the priority is therefore the experiment that forces rival models to predict different outcomes.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Craik’s central distinction is between a formulation that fits known facts and a model that can run ahead of them.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat the harness as the primary product and audit object.
rows.full: Treat the harness as the primary product and audit object. Version, test, document, and govern system prompts, tool permissions, memory rules, routing logic, retries, human approvals, and failure recovery with the same rigor applied to model selection.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat the harness as the primary product and audit object.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Model outputs cannot be meaningfully evaluated apart from the environment producing them.
rows.full: Model outputs cannot be meaningfully evaluated apart from the environment producing them. Two products using identical models can differ radically in accuracy, autonomy, privacy, cost, and risk because their harnesses differ. Organizations that focus mainly on choosing the “best” model will misdiagnose failures and overlook the layer where most practical control—and most preventable harm—actually resides.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Model outputs cannot be meaningfully evaluated apart from the environment producing them.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Create protected disclosure channels for frontier-model risk reporting so that public or confidential safety evidence cannot automatically be converted into punitive evidence against the disclosing firm without an independent capability assessment.
rows.full: Create protected disclosure channels for frontier-model risk reporting so that public or confidential safety evidence cannot automatically be converted into punitive evidence against the disclosing firm without an independent capability assessment.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Create protected disclosure channels for frontier-model risk reporting so that public or confidential safety evidence cannot automatically be converted into punitive evidence against the disclosing firm without an independent capability assessment.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A governance system that punishes the most transparent company will produce less transparency, not safer AI.
rows.full: A governance system that punishes the most transparent company will produce less transparency, not safer AI. Firms will rationally soften evaluations, conceal incidents, and avoid publishing uncomfortable research. Regulators would then make higher-stakes decisions with worse information while the least forthcoming companies gain a competitive advantage. The priority is to separate disclosure of a possible hazard from proof that a particular access restriction is proportionate.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A governance system that punishes the most transparent company will produce less transparency, not safer AI.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Govern AI through enforceable worker control over deployment conditions rather than through abstract judgments about whether AI is beneficial.
rows.full: Govern AI through enforceable worker control over deployment conditions rather than through abstract judgments about whether AI is beneficial. The decisive rights concern workload, staffing, monitoring, quality standards, liability, refusal, and the distribution of productivity gains.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Govern AI through enforceable worker control over deployment conditions rather than through abstract judgments about whether AI is beneficial.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The same model can function as a centaur tool in one institution and a reverse-centaur system in another.
rows.full: The same model can function as a centaur tool in one institution and a reverse-centaur system in another. Technical evaluation alone cannot distinguish them because the difference is produced by contracts, management authority, incentives, and accountability. Without governance at the workplace level, even genuinely useful tools can become mechanisms for deskilling, surveillance, intensification, and blame transfer.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The same model can function as a centaur tool in one institution and a reverse-centaur system in another.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Do not evaluate the reform by the number of AI programs created.
rows.full: Do not evaluate the reform by the number of AI programs created. Evaluate it by whether graduates obtain durable, appropriately skilled employment without producing shortages in complementary fields or oversupplying technical labor.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Do not evaluate the reform by the number of AI programs created.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Program counts measure administrative motion, not successful alignment.
rows.full: Program counts measure administrative motion, not successful alignment. A government can rapidly rename, merge, or authorize degrees while leaving teaching quality, faculty capacity, employer demand, regional inequality, and graduate outcomes unchanged. The central decision criterion should be verified labor-market absorption over time, not curricular conformity with current industrial rhetoric.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Program counts measure administrative motion, not successful alignment.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Establish a compartmentalized access regime for frontier cyber models before imposing broad export controls: accredited domestic agencies and defensive organizations should retain isolated, logged…
rows.full: Establish a compartmentalized access regime for frontier cyber models before imposing broad export controls: accredited domestic agencies and defensive organizations should retain isolated, logged, revocable access under predefined evaluation and use conditions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Establish a compartmentalized access regime for frontier cyber models before imposing broad export controls: accredited domestic agencies and defensive organizations should retain isolated, logged…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Cyber capability is symmetric. Removing a model from trusted defenders does not remove comparable capability from hostile actors, especially when alternative domestic, foreign, or open systems remain available.
rows.full: Cyber capability is symmetric. Removing a model from trusted defenders does not remove comparable capability from hostile actors, especially when alternative domestic, foreign, or open systems remain available. A blunt restriction can therefore reduce U.S. defensive capacity faster than it reduces adversary capacity. The immediate priority is preserving controlled defensive access while separately governing international distribution and prohibited uses.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Cyber capability is symmetric. Removing a model from trusted defenders does not remove comparable capability from hostile actors, especially when alternative domestic, foreign, or open systems remain available.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Measure AI-enabled work at the team and knowledge-system level, not only through individual throughput.
rows.full: Measure AI-enabled work at the team and knowledge-system level, not only through individual throughput. Track shared understanding, review quality, onboarding time, cross-team learning, recoverability, and how many people can explain and maintain agent-produced systems.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Measure AI-enabled work at the team and knowledge-system level, not only through individual throughput.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A company can record faster delivery while silently accumulating social and epistemic debt.
rows.full: A company can record faster delivery while silently accumulating social and epistemic debt. When employees stop seeing how colleagues think and increasingly accept outputs they cannot fully reconstruct, the organization becomes dependent on agents while becoming less capable of diagnosing their failures. The decisive productivity question is not how much code is generated, but whether the team retains the collective understanding needed to govern it.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A company can record faster delivery while silently accumulating social and epistemic debt.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Regulate synthetic abundance through distribution consequences, not merely labels.
rows.full: Regulate synthetic abundance through distribution consequences, not merely labels. YouTube should make provenance, production scale, repetition, automation patterns, and creator accountability meaningful inputs to recommendation and monetization.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Regulate synthetic abundance through distribution consequences, not merely labels.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A disclosure badge does little if thousands of cheap synthetic videos continue to dominate search, autoplay, and recommendation feeds.
rows.full: A disclosure badge does little if thousands of cheap synthetic videos continue to dominate search, autoplay, and recommendation feeds. The platform’s ranking and revenue systems determine whether AI becomes an assistive creative tool or an industrial content-flooding mechanism. The decisive governance layer is not generation but amplification.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A disclosure badge does little if thousands of cheap synthetic videos continue to dominate search, autoplay, and recommendation feeds.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Separate child-safety functions into distinct, auditable stages: age determination, risk detection, user-facing support, parental escalation, emergency escalation, data retention, and human review.
rows.full: Separate child-safety functions into distinct, auditable stages: age determination, risk detection, user-facing support, parental escalation, emergency escalation, data retention, and human review. Each stage should have its own evidentiary threshold, privacy limit, and appeal mechanism.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Separate child-safety functions into distinct, auditable stages: age determination, risk detection, user-facing support, parental escalation, emergency escalation, data retention, and human review.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A single mandate to “protect children” can otherwise authorize an opaque pipeline from private speech to automated classification and external notification.
rows.full: A single mandate to “protect children” can otherwise authorize an opaque pipeline from private speech to automated classification and external notification. The most consequential question is not whether intervention exists, but who receives information, under what conditions, with what confidence, and what happens when the system is wrong.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A single mandate to “protect children” can otherwise authorize an opaque pipeline from private speech to automated classification and external notification.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Evaluate the AI boom through cash-flow durability and financing structure rather than headline capital expenditure.
rows.full: Evaluate the AI boom through cash-flow durability and financing structure rather than headline capital expenditure. Track who is borrowing, when obligations mature, what utilization rates are required, and whether recurring customer revenue covers the full cost of computation, depreciation, energy, and model development.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Evaluate the AI boom through cash-flow durability and financing structure rather than headline capital expenditure.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Equity enthusiasm can conceal weak unit economics for years, but debt introduces deadlines.
rows.full: Equity enthusiasm can conceal weak unit economics for years, but debt introduces deadlines. If expected AI revenue fails to arrive before infrastructure must be refinanced or replaced, firms may cut prices, cancel projects, sell assets, or reduce employment simultaneously. Because the largest firms dominate market indices and global supply chains, those corrections could propagate far beyond shareholders who knowingly chose an AI investment.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Equity enthusiasm can conceal weak unit economics for years, but debt introduces deadlines.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Stop using adoption as a proxy for public approval.
rows.full: Stop using adoption as a proxy for public approval. Measure whether AI use is voluntary, substitutable, informed, beneficial to the user, and reversible—especially when systems are embedded by default in search, work, education, health, and communication.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Stop using adoption as a proxy for public approval.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A society can become highly dependent on systems it neither trusts nor believes it can govern.
rows.full: A society can become highly dependent on systems it neither trusts nor believes it can govern. Once AI-mediated answers replace source browsing and workplace or platform defaults normalize chatbot use, individual behavior may reveal little about genuine preference. Policy based on usage alone will mistake infrastructural dependence for democratic legitimacy.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A society can become highly dependent on systems it neither trusts nor believes it can govern.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Enterprise buyers should treat generative-video procurement as a continuity and dependency problem, not a benchmark contest.
rows.full: Enterprise buyers should treat generative-video procurement as a continuity and dependency problem, not a benchmark contest. Contracts should guarantee model-version access, exportability of assets and prompts, pricing transparency, regional failover, rights documentation, and an operational exit path if the service is withdrawn or restricted.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Enterprise buyers should treat generative-video procurement as a continuity and dependency problem, not a benchmark contest.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Sora and Seedance demonstrate that technically impressive services can disappear because of cost, litigation, or policy.
rows.full: Sora and Seedance demonstrate that technically impressive services can disappear because of cost, litigation, or policy. Once a company builds campaigns, character libraries, approval processes, and software integrations around one generator, model discontinuation becomes a business interruption. The central risk is not receiving a slightly inferior video; it is losing the production system on which the organization has become dependent.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Sora and Seedance demonstrate that technically impressive services can disappear because of cost, litigation, or policy.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Define openness operationally across the entire AI stack: model weights, data formats, prompts, agent state, tool interfaces, evaluation records, identity systems, observability data, deployment artifacts, and exit procedures.
rows.full: Define openness operationally across the entire AI stack: model weights, data formats, prompts, agent state, tool interfaces, evaluation records, identity systems, observability data, deployment artifacts, and exit procedures. A system should count as portable only when an organization can replace a component without reconstructing the surrounding application.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Define openness operationally across the entire AI stack: model weights, data formats, prompts, agent state, tool interfaces, evaluation records, identity systems, observability data, deployment artifacts, and exit procedures.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Nominal support for multiple models does not prevent dependency if essential context, memory, policies, and workflows remain trapped inside one provider.
rows.full: Nominal support for multiple models does not prevent dependency if essential context, memory, policies, and workflows remain trapped inside one provider. As AI becomes part of how software is written and organizations make decisions, loss of access can interrupt not just an application but the institution’s ability to understand and modify its own systems.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Nominal support for multiple models does not prevent dependency if essential context, memory, policies, and workflows remain trapped inside one provider.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat AI implementation as a distinct profession requiring domain inquiry, workflow design, evaluation, privacy analysis, change management, and accountability—not merely proficiency with a particular chatbot.
rows.full: Treat AI implementation as a distinct profession requiring domain inquiry, workflow design, evaluation, privacy analysis, change management, and accountability—not merely proficiency with a particular chatbot.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat AI implementation as a distinct profession requiring domain inquiry, workflow design, evaluation, privacy analysis, change management, and accountability—not merely proficiency with a particular chatbot.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Organizations that hire people simply to “add AI” will reward visible automation rather than appropriate automation.
rows.full: Organizations that hire people simply to “add AI” will reward visible automation rather than appropriate automation. The quality of deployment depends on whether implementers can identify institutional purposes, affected stakeholders, failure consequences, and processes that should not be optimized. Without those capabilities, AI literacy becomes vendor fluency detached from organizational judgment.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Organizations that hire people simply to “add AI” will reward visible automation rather than appropriate automation.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Use language models as explicit, testable models of linguistic expectation while keeping representational and mechanistic claims separate.
rows.full: Use language models as explicit, testable models of linguistic expectation while keeping representational and mechanistic claims separate. Researchers should compare competing models by how well their internal variables predict neural activity across time, brain region, linguistic level, and context.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Use language models as explicit, testable models of linguistic expectation while keeping representational and mechanistic claims separate.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The strongest result is methodological: computational models can generate precise predictions that are tested against millisecond-scale human neural data.
rows.full: The strongest result is methodological: computational models can generate precise predictions that are tested against millisecond-scale human neural data. But collapsing correlation into equivalence would obscure the very scientific opportunity the study creates—identifying exactly where biological and artificial prediction converge, where they diverge, and which additional capacities account for the difference.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The strongest result is methodological: computational models can generate precise predictions that are tested against millisecond-scale human neural data.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Evaluate entrepreneurship platforms by the durability and quality of the livelihoods they enable, not by the number of entities they register or administrative tasks they automate.
rows.full: Evaluate entrepreneurship platforms by the durability and quality of the livelihoods they enable, not by the number of entities they register or administrative tasks they automate.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Evaluate entrepreneurship platforms by the durability and quality of the livelihoods they enable, not by the number of entities they register or administrative tasks they automate.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A surge in LLC formation can indicate expanding opportunity, disguised unemployment, tax optimization, temporary side work, or desperation after layoffs.
rows.full: A surge in LLC formation can indicate expanding opportunity, disguised unemployment, tax optimization, temporary side work, or desperation after layoffs. Platforms may successfully remove filing friction while helping normalize a labor system in which workers personally absorb income volatility, compliance risk, benefits costs, and business failure.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A surge in LLC formation can indicate expanding opportunity, disguised unemployment, tax optimization, temporary side work, or desperation after layoffs.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Shift cyber defense toward continuous, AI-speed validation: automated vulnerability discovery, rapid patching, credential minimization, segmented networks, reproducible incident response…
rows.full: Shift cyber defense toward continuous, AI-speed validation: automated vulnerability discovery, rapid patching, credential minimization, segmented networks, reproducible incident response, and adversarial testing under conditions that approximate real attacker access.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Shift cyber defense toward continuous, AI-speed validation: automated vulnerability discovery, rapid patching, credential minimization, segmented networks, reproducible incident response…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: If the principal change is that known classes of attack can be executed faster and by less-skilled actors, organizations cannot rely on periodic audits or slow human escalation.
rows.full: If the principal change is that known classes of attack can be executed faster and by less-skilled actors, organizations cannot rely on periodic audits or slow human escalation. Their survival will depend on reducing the interval between vulnerability creation, detection, and remediation while preserving human authority over high-consequence defensive actions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: If the principal change is that known classes of attack can be executed faster and by less-skilled actors, organizations cannot rely on periodic audits or slow human escalation.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Regulate AI legal services by function and accountability chain rather than by whether a product is called a lawyer.
rows.full: Regulate AI legal services by function and accountability chain rather than by whether a product is called a lawyer. Courts and regulators should require traceable sources, named human responsibility, documented verification, conflict checks, client consent, and clear escalation thresholds for matters exceeding the system’s competence.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Regulate AI legal services by function and accountability chain rather than by whether a product is called a lawyer.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The likely future is not a binary choice between human lawyers and autonomous machines.
rows.full: The likely future is not a binary choice between human lawyers and autonomous machines. It is a layered legal production system in which automated tools perform increasingly consequential work before a human appears. Accountability must follow the actual workflow, because errors introduced during evidence selection, drafting, or filing may shape the case long before courtroom advocacy begins.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The likely future is not a binary choice between human lawyers and autonomous machines.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Measure AI’s creative value at the team and product level rather than through output speed alone.
rows.full: Measure AI’s creative value at the team and product level rather than through output speed alone. Track concept diversity, prototype abandonment, revision depth, developer autonomy, shipped quality, player response, production stability, and whether workers retain meaningful control over creative decisions.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Measure AI’s creative value at the team and product level rather than through output speed alone.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A pipeline can become faster while the work becomes more standardized, precarious, or strategically constrained.
rows.full: A pipeline can become faster while the work becomes more standardized, precarious, or strategically constrained. Without broader measures, “creativity” can become a legitimating label for throughput increases and labor compression. The relevant question is not whether AI produces more options, but whether teams gain greater capacity to pursue ideas that would otherwise remain impossible.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A pipeline can become faster while the work becomes more standardized, precarious, or strategically constrained.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat every A2A handoff as a governed delegation contract containing authority limits, evidence requirements, provenance, cost ceilings, data-use rules, completion criteria, rollback procedures, and a named accountable principal.
rows.full: Treat every A2A handoff as a governed delegation contract containing authority limits, evidence requirements, provenance, cost ceilings, data-use rules, completion criteria, rollback procedures, and a named accountable principal.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat every A2A handoff as a governed delegation contract containing authority limits, evidence requirements, provenance, cost ceilings, data-use rules, completion criteria, rollback procedures, and a named accountable principal.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A communication protocol can make autonomous collaboration technically easy before institutions have determined who is responsible when agents misunderstand one another, expose information, overspend…
rows.full: A communication protocol can make autonomous collaboration technically easy before institutions have determined who is responsible when agents misunderstand one another, expose information, overspend, provision excessive access, or produce plausible but invalid work. The central challenge is not enabling agents to communicate, but preserving accountability across chains of delegated judgment.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A communication protocol can make autonomous collaboration technically easy before institutions have determined who is responsible when agents misunderstand one another, expose information, overspend…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A genuinely human-centered AI strategy must specify who gains time, who gains income, who carries new risks, who can refuse automation, and who retains authority over redesigned work—not merely provide training and reassuring language.
rows.full: A genuinely human-centered AI strategy must specify who gains time, who gains income, who carries new risks, who can refuse automation, and who retains authority over redesigned work—not merely provide training and reassuring language.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A genuinely human-centered AI strategy must specify who gains time, who gains income, who carries new risks, who can refuse automation, and who retains authority over redesigned work—not merely provide training and reassuring language.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Organizations can communicate AI adoption honestly and still use it to intensify work, reduce staffing, or expand surveillance.
rows.full: Organizations can communicate AI adoption honestly and still use it to intensify work, reduce staffing, or expand surveillance. Human centricity becomes meaningful only when it changes the distribution of benefits, decision rights, and protections. Otherwise it is a more sophisticated narrative for securing employee cooperation with an efficiency program.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Organizations can communicate AI adoption honestly and still use it to intensify work, reduce staffing, or expand surveillance.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The consequential object in agent governance is no longer only the model checkpoint.
rows.full: The consequential object in agent governance is no longer only the model checkpoint. Harness prompts, tool permissions, middleware, memory, verification rules, and recovery policies must be treated as versioned behavioral code-especially when the agent can propose changes to them.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The consequential object in agent governance is no longer only the model checkpoint.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A system can acquire materially different capabilities and risks without changing a single model weight.
rows.full: A system can acquire materially different capabilities and risks without changing a single model weight. Once an agent can redesign the protocol through which it acts, safety depends on the integrity of the evaluator, the boundaries of editable surfaces, the quality of regression tests, and the ability to inspect and reverse every harness transition.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A system can acquire materially different capabilities and risks without changing a single model weight.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Architect agent systems so memory, identity, runtime, tools, skills, and policy remain independently exportable, inspectable, versioned, and replaceable.
rows.full: Architect agent systems so memory, identity, runtime, tools, skills, and policy remain independently exportable, inspectable, versioned, and replaceable. Do not treat “model agnostic” as sufficient portability.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Architect agent systems so memory, identity, runtime, tools, skills, and policy remain independently exportable, inspectable, versioned, and replaceable.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The strongest lock-in will arise from accumulated context and delegated authority rather than model APIs.
rows.full: The strongest lock-in will arise from accumulated context and delegated authority rather than model APIs. Once an agent contains years of organizational history and possesses access across communication, code, finance, and internal systems, replacing it may mean losing institutional memory or rebuilding trust relationships from scratch.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The strongest lock-in will arise from accumulated context and delegated authority rather than model APIs.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Protocol selection should be treated as a governance decision across five separate questions: who may communicate, what may be transmitted, how long interaction state persists, who controls discovery…
rows.full: Protocol selection should be treated as a governance decision across five separate questions: who may communicate, what may be transmitted, how long interaction state persists, who controls discovery, and whether agents may alter the structure of communication at runtime.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Protocol selection should be treated as a governance decision across five separate questions: who may communicate, what may be transmitted, how long interaction state persists, who controls discovery…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Organizations may believe they are choosing a technical interoperability layer while actually committing to a particular distribution of authority, observability, vendor dependence, and behavioral flexibility.
rows.full: Organizations may believe they are choosing a technical interoperability layer while actually committing to a particular distribution of authority, observability, vendor dependence, and behavioral flexibility. Once agents transact, deliberate, and delegate through these protocols, changing the protocol stack may require redesigning the organization that has formed around it.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Organizations may believe they are choosing a technical interoperability layer while actually committing to a particular distribution of authority, observability, vendor dependence, and behavioral flexibility.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat prompts, orchestration rules, role definitions, verification procedures, and workflow topology as learnable system assets with the same versioning, evaluation, provenance, and rollback discipline applied to model checkpoints.
rows.full: Treat prompts, orchestration rules, role definitions, verification procedures, and workflow topology as learnable system assets with the same versioning, evaluation, provenance, and rollback discipline applied to model checkpoints.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat prompts, orchestration rules, role definitions, verification procedures, and workflow topology as learnable system assets with the same versioning, evaluation, provenance, and rollback discipline applied to model checkpoints.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Organizations may obtain substantial capability gains without changing the underlying model.
rows.full: Organizations may obtain substantial capability gains without changing the underlying model. This means behavioral improvement-and behavioral risk-can accumulate in editable natural-language artifacts that are cheaper to modify, easier to transfer, and potentially less scrutinized than trained weights. The practical center of AI development shifts from model training toward institutional learning encoded in the harness.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Organizations may obtain substantial capability gains without changing the underlying model.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Agent systems should not rely on conversational context as their sole world-model substrate.
rows.full: Agent systems should not rely on conversational context as their sole world-model substrate. They need explicit hypothesis stores, contradiction checks, experiment planners, uncertainty tracking, and mechanisms that guarantee every proposed model remains consistent with accumulated evidence.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Agent systems should not rely on conversational context as their sole world-model substrate.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Real agents will encounter environments whose hidden rules are larger, noisier, and less cooperative than nine-state deterministic automata.
rows.full: Real agents will encounter environments whose hidden rules are larger, noisier, and less cooperative than nine-state deterministic automata. If they already forget implications, repeat disproven hypotheses, and issue redundant queries in this controlled setting, increasing context windows or tool access alone will not produce reliable autonomous discovery.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Real agents will encounter environments whose hidden rules are larger, noisier, and less cooperative than nine-state deterministic automata.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Agent evaluation should be built as a versioned control system: expert-authored threat models generate adversarial trials; complete traces preserve behavioral evidence; deterministic rules verify procedural facts…
rows.full: Agent evaluation should be built as a versioned control system: expert-authored threat models generate adversarial trials; complete traces preserve behavioral evidence; deterministic rules verify procedural facts; multiple jurors assess contestable qualities; and unresolved or novel cases escalate back to humans.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Agent evaluation should be built as a versioned control system: expert-authored threat models generate adversarial trials; complete traces preserve behavioral evidence; deterministic rules verify procedural facts…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Autonomous agents can produce convincing final answers while silently violating the process that makes those answers trustworthy.
rows.full: Autonomous agents can produce convincing final answers while silently violating the process that makes those answers trustworthy. A system may claim to have updated a record, performed a compliance check, or consulted a tool when the trace shows otherwise. Evaluation must therefore inspect the causal path from request to action, not merely the linguistic surface presented to the user.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Autonomous agents can produce convincing final answers while silently violating the process that makes those answers trustworthy.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Before deploying an agent, redesign the workflow around bounded authority: separate observation from instruction, isolate untrusted content, require explicit authorization for consequential actions…
rows.full: Before deploying an agent, redesign the workflow around bounded authority: separate observation from instruction, isolate untrusted content, require explicit authorization for consequential actions, minimize persistent credentials, and preserve independent recovery paths.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Before deploying an agent, redesign the workflow around bounded authority: separate observation from instruction, isolate untrusted content, require explicit authorization for consequential actions…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Agent failures propagate differently from chatbot errors.
rows.full: Agent failures propagate differently from chatbot errors. A misleading sentence can become a tool call, credential disclosure, altered record, or executable command. Once AI is connected to operational systems, safety depends less on whether the model usually answers correctly and more on whether the surrounding organization prevents one mistaken interpretation from becoming irreversible action.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Agent failures propagate differently from chatbot errors.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Before automating a role, organizations must map four distinct assets it contains: formal tasks, tacit observations, motivational commitments, and apprenticeship functions.
rows.full: Before automating a role, organizations must map four distinct assets it contains: formal tasks, tacit observations, motivational commitments, and apprenticeship functions. Each requires a separate replacement mechanism; automating only the task leaves the other three silently deleted.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Before automating a role, organizations must map four distinct assets it contains: formal tasks, tacit observations, motivational commitments, and apprenticeship functions.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: An agent can execute every documented step correctly while the organization fails at its actual purpose.
rows.full: An agent can execute every documented step correctly while the organization fails at its actual purpose. Reliability therefore cannot be assessed solely through task completion or policy compliance. Firms must evaluate whether the redesigned system still notices weak signals, preserves meaningful hesitation, integrates consequences across agents, and reproduces the judgment needed for future governance.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: An agent can execute every documented step correctly while the organization fails at its actual purpose.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Organizations building on frontier models must treat regulatory withdrawal as a first-class failure mode.
rows.full: Organizations building on frontier models must treat regulatory withdrawal as a first-class failure mode. Model portability, geographic access rules, personnel eligibility, contractual continuity, fallback providers, and degraded local operation should be designed before the model becomes essential.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Organizations building on frontier models must treat regulatory withdrawal as a first-class failure mode.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A service can remain technically functional yet become unusable overnight because of nationality rules, export controls, military disputes, provider policy, or precautionary over-compliance.
rows.full: A service can remain technically functional yet become unusable overnight because of nationality rules, export controls, military disputes, provider policy, or precautionary over-compliance. In frontier AI, operational continuity depends not only on uptime and pricing but on geopolitical permission.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A service can remain technically functional yet become unusable overnight because of nationality rules, export controls, military disputes, provider policy, or precautionary over-compliance.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The strongest enterprise AI opportunities are often unresolved queues with abundant historical decisions, expensive manual search, and a safe verification step.
rows.full: The strongest enterprise AI opportunities are often unresolved queues with abundant historical decisions, expensive manual search, and a safe verification step. Build layered systems that automate evidence collection and prioritization while keeping consequential routing subject to explicit confirmation.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The strongest enterprise AI opportunities are often unresolved queues with abundant historical decisions, expensive manual search, and a safe verification step.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: This case succeeds because the AI does not need unquestioned authority.
rows.full: This case succeeds because the AI does not need unquestioned authority. A wrong recommendation remains visible in a spreadsheet and can be checked before funds move. That combination—high search cost, recoverable errors, historical examples, and human verification—creates a much safer automation target than workflows where model output immediately triggers irreversible action.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: This case succeeds because the AI does not need unquestioned authority.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The valuable design target is not universal asset portability but low-risk group migration: one-click party trials, friend passes, preserved communication, temporary shared progression, flexible party sizes, and easy return to the previous game.
rows.full: The valuable design target is not universal asset portability but low-risk group migration: one-click party trials, friend passes, preserved communication, temporary shared progression, flexible party sizes, and easy return to the previous game.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The valuable design target is not universal asset portability but low-risk group migration: one-click party trials, friend passes, preserved communication, temporary shared progression, flexible party sizes, and easy return to the previous game.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Multiplayer adoption fails when one person must persuade several others to incur cost and uncertainty at once.
rows.full: Multiplayer adoption fails when one person must persuade several others to incur cost and uncertainty at once. Lowering that collective switching cost can help new games, but permanent cross-game economies introduce substantial governance, balance, ownership, and lock-in problems. Social portability and economic portability should be evaluated separately rather than bundled as one solution.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Multiplayer adoption fails when one person must persuade several others to incur cost and uncertainty at once.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Assessment should separate unaided mastery, AI-assisted production, and reflective judgment.
rows.full: Assessment should separate unaided mastery, AI-assisted production, and reflective judgment. Courses need distinct evidence for what students can do independently, what they can accomplish with tools, and whether they can detect and explain errors in AI-generated work.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Assessment should separate unaided mastery, AI-assisted production, and reflective judgment.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: When grades stop distinguishing knowledge from assisted output, universities lose more than academic integrity.
rows.full: When grades stop distinguishing knowledge from assisted output, universities lose more than academic integrity. They weaken placement decisions, prerequisites, professional accreditation, hiring signals, and students’ ability to recognize gaps in their own understanding.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: When grades stop distinguishing knowledge from assisted output, universities lose more than academic integrity.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Design agent memory as a hierarchy rather than a single context window: keep immediate execution state near the accelerator, reusable computational state in a fast context cache…
rows.full: Design agent memory as a hierarchy rather than a single context window: keep immediate execution state near the accelerator, reusable computational state in a fast context cache, durable semantic memory in governed retrieval systems, and archival evidence in lower-cost storage.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Design agent memory as a hierarchy rather than a single context window: keep immediate execution state near the accelerator, reusable computational state in a fast context cache…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treating every form of context as interchangeable data will produce expensive, insecure, and brittle systems.
rows.full: Treating every form of context as interchangeable data will produce expensive, insecure, and brittle systems. Enterprises must distinguish what should be recomputed, cached, summarized, retained, audited, migrated across models, or deleted. The value of the new tier depends less on storing more state than on governing the right state at the right lifetime.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treating every form of context as interchangeable data will produce expensive, insecure, and brittle systems.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Tie employer tax credits to independently verified labor outcomes: wage floors, paid training, credential portability, job retention, advancement, worker representation in curriculum design…
rows.full: Tie employer tax credits to independently verified labor outcomes: wage floors, paid training, credential portability, job retention, advancement, worker representation in curriculum design, and repayment provisions when promised employment does not materialize.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Tie employer tax credits to independently verified labor outcomes: wage floors, paid training, credential portability, job retention, advancement, worker representation in curriculum design…

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: A training program can be educationally successful and still fail as workforce policy if graduates enter temporary, low-paid, geographically inaccessible, or rapidly automatable jobs.
rows.full: A training program can be educationally successful and still fail as workforce policy if graduates enter temporary, low-paid, geographically inaccessible, or rapidly automatable jobs. The public value lies not in producing more certificates, but in creating durable pathways through technological change.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: A training program can be educationally successful and still fail as workforce policy if graduates enter temporary, low-paid, geographically inaccessible, or rapidly automatable jobs.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Treat every agent loop as a bounded control system with an explicit state model, objective, evaluator, action permissions, resource budget, stagnation detector, human escalation path, and independently enforced kill condition.
rows.full: Treat every agent loop as a bounded control system with an explicit state model, objective, evaluator, action permissions, resource budget, stagnation detector, human escalation path, and independently enforced kill condition.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: Treat every agent loop as a bounded control system with an explicit state model, objective, evaluator, action permissions, resource budget, stagnation detector, human escalation path, and independently enforced kill condition.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The greatest danger is not that an agent produces one bad result, but that it continues acting because its own internal account of progress says it should.
rows.full: The greatest danger is not that an agent produces one bad result, but that it continues acting because its own internal account of progress says it should. Safety therefore depends on external controls that remain authoritative even when the model misunderstands the task, misreads feedback, or believes it has succeeded.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The greatest danger is not that an agent produces one bad result, but that it continues acting because its own internal account of progress says it should.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: The next major AI competition will be over behavioral infrastructure: which company can build the most reliable, extensible, secure, and user-owned system for turning model outputs into sustained action.
rows.full: The next major AI competition will be over behavioral infrastructure: which company can build the most reliable, extensible, secure, and user-owned system for turning model outputs into sustained action.
rows.visualSeed: Visualize as one stark diagram: The next major AI competition will be over behavioral infrastructure: which company can build the most reliable, extensible, secure, and user-owned system for turning model outputs into sustained action.

rows.label: SO_WHAT
rows.kernel: Model quality can be compared and replaced relatively quickly.
rows.full: Model quality can be compared and replaced relatively quickly.
